Heat oven to 220 degrees Celsius. Brush the buns with either milk, heavy cream or egg wash and sprinkle with sesame seeds, if desired. Bake for about 15-20min or until golden. Let cool.

5
For the toppings chop the onions and sauté in a bit of butter, let caramelize, this may take ten to 15 minutes, stir occasionally. Rub the steaks with a bit of garlic and then grill or fry the steaks, the bacon, and eggs with salt and pepper, toast the buns after having cut in half. Spread mustard on one bun half, layer each chivito with steak, a slice of ham, a slice of cheese, one bacon stripe, a tomato slice, and some lettuce. Place fried egg on top and sprinkle generously with chimichurri and some onions right before serving.

steps: Untuk biskuit: Kocok mentega dan gula selama beberapa menit. Tambahkan telur dan madu, aduk rata. Masukkan tepung, maizena, cokelat bubuk, baking soda, dan baking powder, aduk hingga menjadi adonan. Bungkus dengan plastik dan dinginkan di kulkas minimal setengah jam atau semalaman.
Alasi dua loyang dengan kertas roti, panaskan oven pada suhu 200°C.
Bagi adonan menjadi dua bagian. Gilas adonan setebal 2 mm dan potong menjadi lingkaran berdiameter 5-6 cm. Anda akan mendapatkan sekitar 30-40 biskuit. Panggang selama 8-10 menit. Biarkan dingin.
Untuk isian: Ambil dua biskuit yang ukurannya sama, oleskan satu sendok teh dulce de leche di bagian bawah salah satu biskuit, lalu tangkupkan.
Cincang cokelat dan lelehkan dengan mentega dan kulit jeruk parut di atas api kecil. Celupkan setiap sandwich biskuit ke dalam cokelat dan dinginkan di atas kertas roti sebelum disajikan.
en_instructions:
For the cookies cream the butter with the sugar for a few minutes. Then add the egg and honey and mix well. Add flour, cornstarch, cocoa, baking soda and baking powder and mix until you get a dough. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill for at least half an hour or overnight.

2
Line two baking sheets with parchment paper, preheat oven to 200 degrees Celsius.

3
Divide dough into two parts, put one part back in the fridge before using. Roll out second part to about 2 millimeters and cut out round cookies with 5-6 centimeters in diameter. This can be done with a cookie cutter or glass. You should get 30 cookies in total or even more, I get about 40. Bake one baking sheet at the time for about 8-10min. Let cookies cool.

4
For the filling look for two cookies of the same size and place about one sdt of dulce de leche onto the bottom one before sandwiching together.

5
Chop semi-sweet chocolate and melt with butter and orange zest on low heat. Dunk each sandwich cookie into the chocolate and let cool off on parchment paper before serving.

steps: Untuk biskuit: Kocok mentega lembut selama satu menit, tambahkan gula dan kocok lagi dua menit. Masukkan telur, lalu kuning telur. Setelah tercampur rata, masukkan semua bahan sisa dan aduk sekali lagi. Bentuk adonan menjadi bola, bungkus plastik, dan dinginkan minimal setengah jam atau semalaman.
Panaskan oven pada suhu 180°C dan alasi dua loyang dengan kertas roti.
Bagi adonan menjadi dua, gilas hingga cukup tebal di atas permukaan yang ditaburi tepung. Potong biskuit menjadi lingkaran berdiameter sekitar 6 cm. Ulangi hingga adonan habis.

Panggang selama 8-10 menit (biskuit akan terlihat sangat pucat). Biarkan dingin sebelum diisi dengan satu sendok teh dulce de leche. Tangkupkan biskuit lain di atasnya dan gulingkan bagian pinggirnya ke dalam kelapa parut kering. Nikmati.
en_instructions:
For the sandwich cookie cream the soft butter for about a minute, then add the sugar and cream for another two minutes. Incorporate the egg fully before mixing in the egg yolk. Once everything is nicely combined, add all remaining ingredients and mix one more time. Form dough into a ball and wrap in plastic wrap. Chill for at least half an hour or overnight.

2
Preheat oven to 180 degrees Celsius and line two baking sheets with parchment paper.

3
Divide dough in half, put one back in the fridge and roll out the other thickly on a lightly floured surface. Cut out cookies with either the bottom of a glass or a cookie cutter around 6cm in diameter. Repeat with all the dough.

4
Bake for about 8-10min, the cookies will look very pale. Let cool off before filling half with each a sdt of dulce de leche. Place other half of cookies on top and roll the sides of each cookie in the coconut flakes (it helps if the dulce de leche was pressed down to the sides of the cookie). Enjoy.

steps: Untuk karamel: Masukkan 100g gula ke dalam wajan tanpa lemak dan lelehkan di api sedang. Jangan diaduk dengan sendok, cukup goyangkan wajannya. Biarkan meleleh hingga berwarna amber dan gula cair sepenuhnya. Tuang ke dasar empat wadah flan. Karamel akan segera mengeras, jadi harus cepat.
Panaskan oven pada suhu 150°C dan siapkan wadah besar (casserole) yang muat untuk empat wadah flan tersebut.

Panaskan susu dengan 45g gula dan batang vanila yang sudah dibelah dan dikerok isinya. Susu tidak perlu mendidih, cukup panas saja. Angkat batang vanila setelah beberapa menit. Sementara itu, aduk perlahan kuning telur dan telur utuh, jangan sampai berbuih. Tuangkan campuran susu ke dalam campuran telur, aduk perlahan. Tuang ke dalam wadah flan yang sudah diberi karamel dan letakkan di dalam wadah besar. Tuangkan air mendidih ke dalam wadah besar (teknik au bain-marie). Panggang selama 35-40 menit hingga matang.

Biarkan dingin di dalam wadah selama satu jam sebelum dipindahkan ke kulkas. Dinginkan semalaman. Keesokan harinya, lepaskan bagian pinggirnya perlahan lalu balikkan di atas piring. Sajikan dengan sedikit dulce de leche di sampingnya.
en_instructions:
For the caramel place 100 grams of sugar in a frying pan without any fat and melt on sedang heat. Try not to stir with a spoon, but swirl the pan itself. Let melt until you have an amber color and sugar is fully melted. Fill the bottom of four flan containers with it. Caramel will harden immediately, so you need to be fast. My containers yield about 120 milliliters each.

2
Preheat oven to 150 degrees Celsius and look for a casserole or container all your four flan containers fit into.

3
Heat milk with 45 grams of sugar and the cut and scraped out vanilla pod. The milk does not need to boil, just needs to be heated. Take out vanilla pod after a few minutes. Meanwhile stir the egg yolks and eggs gently, try not to incorporate any air in it. Them pour milk-mix into egg-mix and again only stir very gently. Pour into prepared flan containers and place these into your casserole or container. Boil water and pour the water into the buah besar casserole. Be sure not to touch the flan mixture. Place on middle rack in the oven and let bake for about 35-40 minutes. An inserted toothpick should come out clean.

4
Let cool inside the container for an hour before transferring to the fridge. Chill overnight. The next day gently release the rim and then turn upside down on a plate. Serve with some dulce de leche on the side.

steps: Untuk kue bolu (sponge cake): Panaskan oven pada suhu 180°C. Alasi dasar loyang 20 cm dengan kertas roti. Pisahkan putih dan kuning telur. Kocok putih telur dengan sejumput garam hingga mengembang kaku (soft peaks). Kocok kuning telur dengan gula hingga pucat dan kental.

Tuang sepertiga putih telur ke kuning telur, ayak tepung dan maizena di atasnya. Aduk lipat perlahan dengan spatula. Masukkan sisa putih telur dan aduk lipat lagi jangan sampai kempis. Tuang ke loyang dan segera panggang selama 25-35 menit. Dinginkan sebentar sebelum dikeluarkan dari cetakan.

Untuk meringue: Kocok putih telur hingga mengembang kaku, tambahkan gula sedikit demi sedikit sambil terus dikocok hingga mengkilap. Bentuk bintang kecil di atas loyang beralas kertas roti. Keringkan di oven suhu 100°C selama 45 menit. Simpan di wadah kedap udara.

Untuk isian: Kocok krim kental, vanila, dan gula hingga kaku. Iris tipis buah persik. Potong kue menjadi empat lapisan. Olesi setiap lapisan dengan jus persik, lalu beri lapisan krim kocok, persik, dan dulce de leche di lapisan berbeda. Olesi seluruh sisi kue dengan krim kocok. Hias bagian atas dengan persik dan siram dengan glasir jus persik kental. Hancurkan meringue dan tempelkan di seluruh sisi kue. Sajikan segera.
en_instructions:
For the sponge cake preheat oven to 180 degrees Celsius and prepare either one or two 20cm/8 inch cake pan(s). Line bottom with parchment paper. Then divide the eggs into egg white and egg yolks. Use a bigger bowl for the egg yolks. If you have a glass or metal bowl, use that one for the egg whites. Be sure that bowl is free of fat/grease and that your mixer was properly cleaned. First beat the egg whites on sedang speed with a sejumput of salt until soft peaks form. Set aside. Without cleaning our mixer, beat the egg yolks with the sugar. Beat until the color becomes much paler and you have a creamy consistency. This usually takes several minutes.

2
Gently pour one third of the egg whites on top of the mixed egg yolks and sift the flour and cornstarch on top. Don't skip this step. It is important that the flour mix was sifted. Gently mix all ingredients with a spatula. Try to incorperate the flour mix and egg whites without losing volume. Add the last two thirds of beaten egg whites and gently fold the mixture. Don't overmix. Put batter into the prepared cake pans and immediately bake. Don't let the batter sit for too long as it will quickly lose volume. Bake for 35 minutes if using one springform or 25 minutes if using two. Let cool a little before gently getting them out of the form. Tip: if making the day before, wrap in cling wrap, it is much easier to cut in half once cold.

3
For the meringue beat egg white until soft peaks form, add sejumput of salt and continue beating on high while adding the sugar. Beat for at least three more minutes until glossy and shiny. Pipe kecil stars or other shapes with the meringue on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Dry for about 45min at 100 degrees Celsius in the oven. Keep in airtight container until further use.

4
For the filling beat heavy cream, vanilla extract and sugar until stiff peaks form, slice peaches in thin slices. Cut cake in four layers, this is much easier done once the cake layers are cold. Brush cake layer with some of the peach juice left, then pipe thin layer of whipped cream around the edges, place the peach slices in the middle on first layer on cake, on the second layer only spread the dulce de leche. Repeat layer with brushed peach juice, whipped cream and peaches for the third and final layer. Be sure to reserve enough peach slices for the top. Spread thin layer of whipped cream on the sides of the cake and pipe on some roses around the edges if desired. Heat the peach juice and mix the cornstarch with a bit of water until you see no lumps. Once juice is hot, add the cornstarch and stir until glaze thickenes. Pour over peaches of the top layer cake. Crush the meringue and pat around the sides. Serve immediately.

ingredients.name: Susu Kental Manis (untuk dulce de leche)

steps: Untuk isian (dulce de leche): Rebus kaleng susu kental manis dalam panci berisi air (kaleng harus terendam sepenuhnya) selama 2,5 jam. Biarkan dingin sebelum dibuka.

Untuk adonan: Campurkan tepung, cokelat bubuk, dan garam. Masukkan potongan mentega dingin dan remas dengan jari hingga bertekstur remah. Tambahkan telur dan uleni hingga menjadi adonan. Tambahkan susu jika terlalu kering. Bungkus dan dinginkan di kulkas minimal setengah jam.
Alasi loyang dengan kertas roti dan panaskan oven pada suhu 180°C.

Gilas adonan hingga tipis. Potong menjadi lingkaran diameter 12 cm. Letakkan 2-3 sdt dulce de leche di tengah. Olesi pinggirannya dengan susu. Lipat menjadi setengah bulan dan tekan pinggirannya dengan garpu.
Letakkan empanada di loyang, olesi dengan telur. Panggang selama 20-25 menit.
Setelah matang, olesi segera dengan mentega cair dan taburi campuran gula dan kayu manis. Bisa dinikmati hangat atau dingin. Hati-hati dengan isian yang panas!
en_instructions:
For the filling place the can in a buah besar pot and cover completely with water. Boil for two and a half hours, occassionally adding water. Let cool before opening. For further tips, please check here.

2
For the dough combine the flour, cocoa powder, and salt in a buah besar bowl. Add the cold butter in kecil pieces and rub into crumbs with your fingers Add the egg and work into a dough. You may have to add milk, a sdm at a time if it still is to dry. Wrap and chill for at least half an hour or overnight.

3
Line a baking sheeet with parchment paper and preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.

4
Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface, it should be thin. Cut out circles of 12cm either with a cookie cutter or with a keciler plate/dish. Put two to three sdts of the dulce de leche in the middle of each circle. Brush the edges with milk, I do this with my pinkie. Fold each circle in half so that you have a half moon and press down the edges with a fork. You can also turn the edges about half a centimeter inwards every centimeter or so to create a pattern.

5
Place the prepared empanadas on the baking sheet and brush with egg wash. Bake for about 20-25min.

6
Towards the end of the baking time, melt the remaining butter and mix the sugar and cinnamon in a kecil bowl. Once you take the empanadas out, immediately brush with the butter and sprinkle with the sugar mix. Empanadas can be enjoyed either still warm or cold. If eating warm, be careful not to burn yourself with hot filling!

steps: Masukkan sengkel sapi, 1 bawang bombay kecil yang dibelah dua, paprika belah dua, 4 siung bawang putih utuh, bagian hijau tua bawang prei, dan kaldu ke dalam panci besar. Masak selama 45-60 menit hingga daging empuk.
Jika daging sudah empuk, angkat potongan sayuran besar dan tulang. Buang.

Masukkan bawang bombay potong dadu, 2 siung bawang putih cincang, cabai manis mini, irisan bawang prei (bagian hijau muda), daun bawang, singkong, dan jagung. Aduk dan rebus tertutup dengan api sedang selama 5-8 menit hingga singkong mulai empuk.
Tambahkan talas, ubi putih, dan labu madu. Aduk rata. Rebus tertutup dengan api sedang selama 5-6 menit hingga semua umbi-umbian empuk. Jangan masak terlalu lama agar tidak hancur.
Cicipi dan tambahkan garam jika perlu. Masukkan ketumbar dan sisa 2 siung bawang putih cincang. Aduk dan biarkan mendidih selama 2 menit lagi.
Sajikan panas dalam mangkuk sup besar, bagi daging dan sayuran secara merata. Tambahkan perasan jeruk nipis atau saus sambal jika suka. Sajikan dengan arepa atau casabe (roti singkong).
en_instructions:
Add hind shank, 1 halved kecil onion, halved bell pepper, 4 whole garlic siung, the dark green leaves of the leek, and stock to a buah besar stockpot. Cook for 45-60 minutes until the meat is fork-tender. NOTE: the meat can take a bit longer to be fork-tender; that is okay, just add more cooking time if necessary.
When the meat is tender, remove the big pieces of vegetables and bones. Discard.
Add diced onion, 2 dicincang halus garlic, mini sweet peppers, diiris leeks (light green part), scallions, yucca, and corn; Mix and simmer covered over sedang heat for 5- 8 minutes, until the yucca is starting to soften. NOTE: the yuca can take a bit longer to start softening; that is okay, just add more cooking time if necessary.
Add yautia, white yam, and butternut squash. Mix to combine. Simmer covered over sedang heat for 5 – 6 minutes, until all the root vegetables are tender. NOTE: Do not cook too much, or they will fall apart.
Taste and add salt to your taste, if necessary. Add cilantro and the remaining 2 dicincang halus garlic siung. Mix and let simmer for 2 more minutes.
Serve hot in buah besar soup bowls, dividing the meat and vegetables evenly. Add a squish of lime juice and/or hot sauce, if desired. Serve along with arepas and or casabe (cassava bread).

steps: Bumbui daging dengan garam, merica, dan bawang putih cincang.
Potong 1 bawang bombay menjadi 4 bagian besar.
Masukkan daging ke dalam panci presto bersama potongan bawang bombay dan kaldu.
Masak presto selama 20 menit.
Lepaskan tekanan dan buka tutupnya.
Angkat daging dan SIMPAN 2 cangkir kaldu di wadah lain.
Dengan 2 garpu, suwir-suwir daging sapi. Daging harus cukup empuk agar mudah disuwir. Jika belum, masak lagi 10 menit.
Tekan tombol tumis (saute) pada panci. Tambahkan minyak zaitun.
Setelah panas, masukkan irisan bawang bombay, paprika, dan tomat. Masak hingga empuk.
Masukkan kembali daging suwir ke dalam panci dan aduk.
Tuangkan 1 1/2 cangkir kaldu yang disimpan tadi, saus Inggris, pasta tomat, saus tomat, dan jintan. Aduk rata.
Jika saus terlihat terlalu kering, tambahkan sedikit lagi kaldu.
Bumbui dengan garam dan merica.
Sajikan!
en_instructions:
Season beef with salt, pepper and dicincang halus garlic
Chop 1 onion in 4 big wedges
Place in the beef pressure cooker with the 4 wedges of onion and the stock
Pressure cook for 20 minutes
Release the pressure and open the lid
Remove the beef and SAVE 2 cangkir of stock in another container
With 2 forks, shred the beef. Beef should be tender enough to so easily. If not, cook for another 10 minutes
Press the saute button of the Instant pot. Add the olive oil
When the machine beeps, add the diiris onion, pepper and tomatoes. Cook until tender
Add the shredded beef back in the pot and mix
Pour in 1 1/2 cangkir of the saved stock, the Worcestershire sauce, tomato paste, ketchup and cumin. Mix
If sauce seems to dry, add a tad more of stock
Season with salt and pepper
Serve!

steps: Masak daging: Masukkan daging steak dalam panci berisi kaldu atau air dan garam. Masak dengan api kecil selama sekitar 2 jam hingga empuk dan mudah disuwir.
Suwir daging: Setelah matang, tiriskan dan suwir daging menggunakan dua garpu.

Siapkan sayuran: Tumis bawang bombay cincang, paprika, dan bawang putih dengan sedikit minyak. Tambahkan jintan, oregano, paprika bubuk, dan garam. Masukkan daging dan masak selama beberapa menit hingga bumbu meresap.
Buat adonan: Dalam mangkuk, campur tepung jagung (cornmeal) dengan air hangat dan garam hingga menjadi adonan lembut. Diamkan selama 5 menit.
Bentuk arepa: Bagi adonan menjadi 6 bagian, bentuk menjadi bola, lalu pipihkan menjadi cakram tebal.
Masak: Masak arepa di atas wajan datar (griddle) dengan api sedang selama 2-3 menit tiap sisi hingga keemasan. Anda bisa memanggangnya sebentar di oven agar lebih renyah.
Isi: Belah arepa di satu sisi, isi dengan daging suwir panas dan taburi keju parut di atasnya.
en_instructions:
Cook the meat: Place the flank steak in a pot with broth or water and salt. Cook over low heat for about 2 hours, until tender and easy to shred.
Shred the meat: Once cooked, drain and shred the meat using two forks.
Prepare the vegetables: Sauté cincang onion, bell pepper, and garlic in a little oil. Add cumin, oregano, paprika, and salt. Stir in the meat and cook for a few minutes until the flavors are well combined.
Make the dough: In a bowl, mix the cornmeal with warm water and salt until a soft dough forms. Let it rest for 5 minutes.
Form the arepas: Divide the dough into 6 portions, shape into balls, and flatten into thick discs.
Cook: Cook the arepas on a griddle or skillet over sedang heat for 2–3 minutes on each side until golden. You can then bake them for a few minutes if you prefer them crispier.
Fill: Slice the arepas open on one side, fill with the hot shredded beef, and top with diparut cheese.

steps: Campurkan gelatin dengan ¼ cangkir air suhu ruang; diamkan hingga melunak (5 menit). Dalam panci kecil, campur sari buah markisa, gula, dan campuran gelatin. Masak di api sedang-tinggi, aduk hingga rata dan halus (jangan sampai mendidih). Angkat dan dinginkan sepenuhnya. Aduk masuk susu kental manis.
Sementara itu, kocok putih telur dengan mikser hingga kaku (stiff peaks).

Aduk 1/3 putih telur ke dalam campuran markisa yang sudah dingin. Gunakan spatula untuk melipat sisa putih telur secara perlahan hingga rata. Bagi mousse ke dalam gelas saji; tutup. Masukkan kulkas minimal 2 jam.
Sajikan dingin. Hiasi dengan daun mint jika suka.
en_instructions:
Add gelatin and ¼ cup room-temperature water to kecil bowl; let sit until gelatin softens, about 5 minutes. In sedang saucepan over sedang-high heat, stir together passion fruit pulp, sugar and gelatin mixture. Cook, stirring occasionally, until mixture is thoroughly combined and smooth (mixture should not come to a boil). Remove from heat; cool completely. Stir in condensed milk.
Meanwhile, in clean mixing bowl, using electric mixer, beat egg whites until stiff (peaks of egg whites will not droop, and egg whites will not move when bowl is tilted).
Stir 1/3 egg whites into cooled passion fruit mixture until combined. Using spatula, gently fold in remaining egg whites until combined. Divide mousse evenly among clear glass serving cangkir; cover. Refrigerate mousse until well chilled, at least 2 hrs.
Serve chilled. Garnish with mint, if desired.

steps: Siapkan daging dalam wajan, tambahkan garam dan merica. Panaskan kacang hitam di api sedang. Goreng atau panggang pisang sesuai petunjuk kemasan. Potong tomat dadu kecil. Sisihkan.
Panaskan wajan datar dan panggang arepa hingga keemasan di kedua sisi.
Gunakan pisau untuk membelah arepa di bagian tengah, buat ruang untuk mengisi dengan pisang, kacang, daging, dan tomat.
Sajikan dengan sedikit saus pico de gallo atau guacamole.
en_instructions:
Prepare the meat in a skillet and add salt and pepper secukupnya, heat the beans over sedang heat in a pan, fry or grill the ripe plantains as indicated on its package and cut the tomato into kecil cubes. Reserve these ingredients until filling. 
Preheat the grill or pan and grill the arepa, putting it once on each side until they are golden brown. 
With the help of a knife, open it by the edge through the middle, creating a space to fill it with the ripe plantain, the beans, meat and cincang tomato. 
Serve with a little pico de gallo or guacamole dip sauce.

strMeal: Makan Malam Jiggs (Rebusan Daging & Sayuran Kanada)

ingredients.name: Kacang Polong Kuning Belah (Yellow Split Peas)

steps: Malam sebelumnya, potong daging sapi asin menjadi bongkahan besar dan rendam dalam air semalaman (minimal 8-10 jam). Rendam juga kacang polong belah dalam wadah terpisah.

Tiriskan daging dan masukkan ke dalam panci besar. Tuangkan air segar sekitar 6-7 liter. Masukkan kacang polong ke dalam kantong kain pudding atau kain tipis berlapis tiga, ikat kuat, sisakan ruang untuk kacang mengembang.
Masukkan kantong kacang ke dalam panci, ikat talinya ke pegangan luar panci agar tidak menempel di dasar. Didihkan, lalu kecilkan api dan rebus perlahan selama 2 jam.
Angkat kantong kacang, tuang isinya ke mangkuk, campur dengan mentega dan merica. Sisihkan.
Masukkan kubis ke dalam panci dan rebus selama 20 menit. Tambahkan lobak, wortel, dan kentang, lalu rebus selama 20 menit lagi hingga sayuran empuk.
Angkat daging dan sayuran dari panci dan letakkan di piring saji besar.
Air rebusan bisa diminum sebagai kaldu atau dididihkan hingga menyusut untuk dijadikan saus (gravy) yang disiramkan di atas makanan.
en_instructions:
The night before, break salt beef into big chunks and soak in water overnight, at least 8-10 hours. Put split peas into a bowl and cover with water to soak overnight.
Drain the salt beef and place it into a buah besar stockpot. Cover with fresh water, at least 6-7 litres. Place the split peas into a pease pudding canvas bag or triple layer of cheesecloth and tie, making sure to leave room for peas to expand inside the bag.
Put the bag inside the pot, tying the strings to the outside handle so it doesn't stick to the bottom of the pot with the salt beef. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer for 2 hours.
Remove the peas pudding bag and empty contents into a bowl, mixing with butter and pepper for taste. Set aside.
Add your cabbage to the pot and boil for 20 more minutes. Then add turnip, carrots and potatoes then boil for 20 more, or until vegetables are tender.
Remove salt beef and vegetables from the pot and put them on a platter.
Use the cooking liquid in two ways; as a pot liquor which some people like to drink or reduce it to make a jus or gravy to pour over the meal.

steps: Untuk kulit pai: Campur tepung dan garam dalam mangkuk besar. Masukkan mentega dan shortening dingin, campur dengan tangan hingga bertekstur seperti gandum kasar dengan butiran sebesar kacang polong. Kocok telur, cuka, dan air es di gelas ukur hingga 1 cangkir. Tuang ke campuran tepung, aduk hingga menyatu. Jangan diaduk berlebihan.
Bagi adonan menjadi 5 bagian, bentuk cakram dan bungkus plastik. Dinginkan 2 cakram di kulkas selama 1 jam. Sisanya bisa dibekukan.
Panaskan oven pada suhu 180°C. Alasi loyang dengan aluminium foil untuk menampung tetesan.
Gilas 1 cakram adonan menjadi lingkaran 30 cm di permukaan yang ditaburi tepung. Letakkan di dasar loyang pai 23 cm hingga melewati pinggiran.

Untuk isian: Campur saskatoon berry dengan gula dan maizena hingga rata. Tuang ke dasar pai. Beri potongan mentega di atasnya. Gilas cakram kedua, potong menjadi 6 strip lebar. Anyam strip di atas pai (anyaman lattice). Lipat pinggiran adonan bawah ke atas ujung anyaman.
Olesi bagian atas dengan kocokan telur dan taburi gula. Panggang selama 90-100 menit hingga cokelat keemasan dan isian berbuih. Dinginkan di rak kawat.
Sajikan hangat atau suhu ruang dengan krim kocok atau es krim. Tahan hingga 4 hari di kulkas.
en_instructions:
To make the pastry, place the flour and salt in a buah besar bowl. Mix well. Add the cubes of butter and shortening and mix them in (I like to use my hands to mix the fat into the flour, but you can use a pastry blender) just until it looks like coarse oatmeal with some pea-sized bits remaining. Place the egg in a 2-cup measure and beat it with a fork. Beat in the vinegar and just enough ice-cold water to bring it to the 1-cup mark. Stir this into the flour mixture, just until the dough clings together. I like to use my hands for this part as well, but a wooden spoon would also work. Try not to overmix it.
On a lightly floured surface, gather the dough into a ball and divide it into 5 evenly sized portions. Shape each portion into a disc and wrap tightly in plastic. Chill 2 of these discs for 1 hour. Freeze the other 3 in a resealable freezer bag for future use. The pastry keeps well in the freezer for up to 2 months.
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Place the rack in the lower third of the oven. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil to catch drippings.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out 1 disc of pastry into a 12-inch circle, or thereabouts. Place it in the bottom of a 9-inch pie plate, with the pastry overhanging the edges of the pie plate.
To make the filling, place the saskatoon berries in a buah besar bowl and stir in the 1/2 cup sugar and the cornstarch until well combined. Pour the berry mixture into the bottom of the pie. Dot with the butter. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the pastry in another 12-inch circle for the top crust. Use a ruler to guide you when cutting the pastry into 6 wide, long strips to keep the edges straight. Save the 2 end pieces in case you need to do any patching. I like wide strips, but if you like a thinner look, feel free to cut thin strips of pastry. Weave the pastry strips, going over and under, making sure they connect with the edges of the pie crust. Fold over the edges of the bottom crust, tucking in the lattice ends. This will help to trap the juices and give a rustic look.
If you prefer a cleaner, tidier look, you can trim the overhanging pieces and crimp the edges with a fork. Brush the top of the pie with the egg wash. Sprinkle with the remaining sdtp sugar. Place the pie on the prepared baking sheet and bake it for about 90 – 100 minutes, until it’s golden brown and bubbling. Remove the pie from the oven and place it on a wire rack to cool.
Serve the pie warm or at room temperature with whipped cream or ice cream. Makes 6 servings. This keeps well if covered with plastic and refrigerated for up to 4 days.

steps: Panaskan oven pada suhu 180°C. Olesi loyang persegi 20 cm dengan mentega.

Untuk isian kurma: Campur kurma dan air dalam panci sedang di api tinggi hingga mendidih. Kecilkan api dan rebus perlahan sambil diaduk hingga mengental (6-8 menit). Angkat, masukkan vanila dan dinginkan.

Campur oats, tepung, gula, baking soda, dan garam dalam food processor. Tekan tombol pulse 3 kali (jangan sampai jadi bubuk). Masukkan mentega dan pulse lagi hingga bertekstur remah kasar. Transfer ke mangkuk untuk mencampur mentega secara merata.
Ratakan setengah campuran oat di dasar loyang, tekan-tekan agar padat. Tuangkan isian kurma di atasnya dan ratakan. Tutup dengan sisa campuran oat dan tekan lembut.
Panggang di tengah oven selama 30-35 menit hingga kuning keemasan. Biarkan dingin sepenuhnya di loyang sebelum dipotong dan disajikan. Tahan seminggu di kulkas atau 3 bulan di freezer.
en_instructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease an 8-inch (20 cm) square baking pan.
To make the date filing: Combine the dates and water in a sedang saucepan over high heat and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens, around 6 to 8 minutes. Remove from heat, stir in vanilla and let cool. Set aside.
Combine rolled oats, flour, sugar, baking soda and salt in a food processor. Pulse 3 times (careful not to overmix, you don’t want the mixture to be powdery, just combined). Add butter and pulse again until the mixture is crumbly in pea-sized clumps. Transfer to a mixing bowl to thoroughly mix in the butter.
Spread half of the oat mixture on the bottom of the prepared baking pan, pressing down to make a flat, equal bottom later. Add the date mixture over the crust and then spread evenly. Layer with the remaining oat mixture and press down to flatten the top layer.
Bake in the centre of the oven until the top is golden brown, 30 to 35 minutes. Let cool completely in the pan before cutting and serving. Date Squares keep well, covered in the refrigerator for up to a week, and frozen for 2 to 3 months.

steps: Panaskan oven pada suhu 180°C dan alasi loyang dengan kertas roti.
Dalam mikser, kocok mentega, gula pasir, dan telur hingga menyatu. Tambahkan molasses dan vanila, aduk hingga halus.
Setelah tercampur, masukkan campuran baking soda dan air, aduk selama satu menit.

Campur bahan kering: baking powder, kayu manis, tepung, dan garam di wadah terpisah, lalu masukkan ke adonan basah sedikit demi sedikit dengan kecepatan rendah hingga rata. Adonan harus mudah dibentuk.
Ambil adonan dengan sendok kecil, bulatkan, letakkan di loyang, lalu pipihkan dengan dasar gelas atau telapak tangan yang lembap.
Panggang selama 10-12 menit. Angkat dan dinginkan minimal 10 menit.
Setelah dingin, buat sandwich kue dengan mengoleskan minimal dua sendok teh selai favorit Anda di antara dua kue. Nikmati dengan teh.
en_instructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 °F (180 °C) and line a buah besar baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a stand mixer with the paddle attachment, cream the butter, white sugar and egg until combined, then add the molasses and vanilla and mix until smooth.
Once combined, add the baking soda water mixture and mix for another minute to combine.
Combine dry ingredients; mix baking powder, cinnamon, flour and salt in a separate bowl then add to the wet ingredients a little at a time, mixing on low until fully combined and scraping down the sides to ensure everything is incorporated. The dough should be easily shaped.
Portion dough with a kecil spoon, roll them into balls and place them on the lined cookie sheet, press them into flat discs using a floured glass or your moistened palm.
Place cookies on parchment-lined baking sheets and bake for 10-12 mins. Remove from the oven and let them cool for at least 10 minutes.
Once cooled the cookie sandwiches by spreading at least two sdts of your favourite jam between the two cookies. Repeat and enjoy with a cup of tea.

steps: Panaskan oven pada suhu 175°C.

Campur semua bahan kulit pai (remahan biskuit, mentega cair, gula, kayu manis). Sisihkan 2 sdm untuk taburan nanti. Tekan campuran ke loyang pai 23 cm di dasar dan pinggirannya. Panggang selama 10 menit hingga sedikit kecokelatan.

Campur bahan isian custard vanila (susu, gula, maizena, kuning telur, vanila, garam) dan masak di api sedang sambil terus diaduk hingga meletup-letup dan mengental seperti puding. Sisihkan selagi membuat topping meringue.
Dalam mikser, kocok bahan meringue (putih telur, gula, cream of tartar) hingga kaku dan mengkilap (stiff peaks).
Untuk menyusun pai, tuang isian ke kulit pai, tutup dengan lapisan tebal meringue, buat puncak-puncak kecil di atasnya. Taburkan sisa remahan biskuit. Panggang di oven.
Panggang hingga meringue kecokelatan, sekitar 10 menit, awasi dengan teliti.
Dinginkan di kulkas dan sajikan dalam beberapa jam. Pai ini paling baik dimakan di hari yang sama agar meringue tidak mencair.
en_instructions:
Preheat the oven to 350˚F.
Mix all the crust ingredients (graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, granulated sugar and ground cinnamon) in a sedang bowl. Set aside about 2 sdtp (30 mL) for later and press the mixture into a 9-inch deep-dish pie plate in the bottom and up the sides. Bake crust for 10 minutes, it will only brown slightly.
Combine the vanilla custard filling ingredients (milk, granulated sugar, cornstarch, egg yolks, vanilla extract and salt together) and cook on sedang heat, stirring constantly, until it bubbles and thickens to the texture of pudding. Set aside to cool while you make the meringue topping.
In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the beater attachment or in a buah besar bowl using an electric mixer beat the meringue ingredients (egg whites, granulated sugar, cream of tartar) together until it holds stiff and glossy peaks.
To assemble the pie, pour the filling into the crust and top with a thick layer of the meringue, making little spikes that will brown on top. Sprinkle the reserved crumb over the top and place it into the preheated oven.
Bake until the meringue browns, around 10 minutes, making sure to watch it carefully.
Chill in the fridge and eat within a few hours of baking. This pie is best eaten the same day as the meringue will soften and liquify.

steps: Dalam mangkuk sedang, aduk rata tepung, gula palem, baking powder, dan rempah-rempah.
Tambahkan kismis dan aduk rata, pastikan kismis terlapisi campuran tepung.

Tambahkan mentega cair, molasses, dan air, lalu aduk dengan sendok kayu. Bentuk adonan menjadi bola dengan sendok atau tangan, lalu masukkan ke dalam kantong kain pudding katun. Ikat kantongnya, sisakan ruang minimal 2,5 cm agar puding bisa mengembang saat dimasak.
Rebus puding selama 1,5 jam. (Di Newfoundland, ini biasanya dilakukan di satu panci bersama Makan Malam Jiggs, tapi bisa dilakukan terpisah).
Setelah puding terasa padat, angkat dari air mendidih dan biarkan dingin sebentar sebelum dikeluarkan dari kantong kain.

Potong puding seperti kue dan sajikan dengan saus hangat pilihan Anda: saus mentega rum, molasses hangat, atau saus Molasses Coady (campuran 1 cangkir molasses, 1/4 cangkir mentega, dan 1/4 cangkir air) yang umum di Newfoundland.
en_instructions:
In a sedang bowl, whisk together flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and spices.
Add raisins and stir well, making sure to coat the raisins in the flour mixture.
Add melted butter, molasses and water and mix with a wooden spoon. Form a ball with the spoon or your hands and put the dough ball in a cotton pudding bag. Tie the bag, leaving at least 1 inch of room to allow the pudding to expand while cooking.
Boil pudding for 1.5 hours. (In NL, this is typically done in the pot along with Jiggs Dinner, but it can be done independently.)
When the duff is firm, remove it from the boiling water and let it cool slightly before removing it from the pudding bag.
Slice pudding like a cake and serve with the warm sauce of your choice: rum butter sauce, warmed molasses or Molasses Coady sauce (1 cup (250 mL) molasses, 1/4 cup (60 mL) butter, 1/4 cup (60 mL) water) is common in Newfoundland.

steps: Panaskan minyak di api sedang-tinggi dalam wajan besar, tumis bawang bombay dan bawang putih hingga layu (sekitar 5 menit). Masukkan daging sapi, daging babi, dan rempah-rempah, masak hingga daging kecokelatan.

Masukkan kaldu sapi dan biarkan mendidih, lalu kecilkan api. Masukkan parutan kentang dan aduk rata. Masak hingga cairan hampir habis (sekitar 15 menit). Angkat daun salam dan beri garam secukupnya. Angkat wajan dan biarkan campuran mendingin sepenuhnya – pai akan terpanggang lebih baik jika isian dalam keadaan dingin.

Panaskan oven pada suhu 190°C. Di permukaan yang ditaburi tepung, gilas satu lembar adonan kulit pai hingga ketebalan kurang dari 0,5 cm dan alasi loyang pai 23 cm. Masukkan isian tourtière yang sudah dingin dan ratakan. Gilas lembar adonan kedua, buat lubang di tengahnya (untuk keluarnya uap) dan letakkan di atas isian. Rapikan pinggirannya dan tekan-tekan agar menyatu. Olesi kulit pai dengan kocokan telur.
Panggang selama sekitar 45 menit atau hingga kulit pai berwarna cokelat keemasan. Dinginkan selama 15 menit sebelum dipotong dan disajikan.
Porsi: 8-10 orang (menghasilkan 2 loyang pai 23 cm).
en_instructions:
Heat oil on sedang-high heat in a buah besar sauté pan or skillet, then sauté the onion and garlic until softened, about 5 minutes. Add the ground beef, pork, and spices and cook until the meat is browned.
Add the beef broth and bring it up to a simmer then reduce heat to sedang low. Add the diparut potato and stir it in. Cook until liquid is almost absorbed, about 15 min. Remove the bay leaves and add salt secukupnya. Remove the pan from the heat and let the mixture cool completely — it bakes best if the filling is chilled.
Preheat the oven to 375 °F (190 °C). On a lightly floured surface, roll out one disc of the pie dough to less than the 1/4-inch thickness and line the 9-inch pie plate. Fill this with the cooled tourtière mixture and spread out evenly. Roll out the remaining dough to the same thickness, cut a hole in the centre (for steam to escape) and place on top of the filling. Trim the dough to 1/2-inch beyond the edge of the pie plate and sejumput the edges of the crust together. Brush the crust with the egg wash.
Bake tourtière for about 45 minutes or until the pastry is a rich golden brown. Let cool for 15 minutes before slicing disiram tipis-tipis.
Serves: 8-10 (makes 2 9-inch pies)

steps: Panaskan oven pada suhu 175°C. Olesi mentega dan alasi loyang bulat 23 cm atau loyang roti dengan kertas roti.
Masukkan potongan ubi jalar ke dalam food processor dan proses hingga parutannya sangat halus. Dalam mangkuk kecil, campur kismis dengan 2 sendok teh tepung (dari takaran total). Sisihkan.

Dalam mangkuk besar, campur parutan ubi jalar, gula palem, tepung terigu, ekstrak vanila, allspice, kayu manis, pala, jahe, dan garam. Masukkan 1 1/2 cangkir santan dan aduk hingga menjadi adonan. Masukkan kismis yang sudah dibalur tepung.
Tuang adonan ke dalam loyang yang sudah disiapkan dan ratakan bagian atasnya. Panggang tanpa tutup selama 1 jam 30 menit, hingga sebagian besar set namun bagian tengahnya masih sedikit lembut.
en_instructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and line a 9-inch round pan or loaf pan with parchment paper.
Place your cut sweet potatoes in the bowl of a food processor and process until siung diparut. In a kecil bowl, toss raisins in 2 sdts flour from the ½ cup. Set aside.
In a buah besar bowl, combine diparut sweet potatoes, light brown sugar, all-purpose flour, vanilla extract, allspice, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, and salt. Stir in 1½ cangkir of coconut milk until a batter forms. Fold in the raisins that were tossed in the flour.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top. Bake uncovered for 1 hour 30 minutes, until mostly set but still slightly soft in the center

strMeal: Es Krim Grape Nut Khas Jamaika
steps: Dalam mangkuk besar, gunakan mikser listrik untuk mengocok krim kental dingin hingga kaku (stiff peaks). Masukkan susu kental manis dan ekstrak vanila secara perlahan (fold) hingga tercampur rata.
Masukkan sereal dan aduk perlahan hingga tersebar merata di seluruh adonan.

Tuang adonan ke dalam wadah tahan beku (seperti loyang roti). Letakkan plastik pembungkus di atas permukaan es krim untuk menghindari bunga es. Tutup wadah dan bekukan selama minimal 6 jam atau hingga padat.
Setelah beku, biarkan es krim di suhu ruang selama beberapa menit agar sedikit lunak sebelum disendok dan disajikan.
en_instructions:
In a buah besar bowl, use an electric mixer to whip the cold heavy cream until stiff peaks form. Gently fold in the sweetened condensed milk and vanilla extract until well combined.
Fold in the cereal and stir until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
Pour the mixture into a freezer-safe container (such as a loaf pan). Lay plastic wrap on top of the ice cream to avoid freezer burn. Cover the container and freeze for at least 6 hours or until solid.
Once frozen, let the ice cream sit at room temperature for a few minutes to soften slightly before scooping and serving.

strMeal: Es Krim Rum Raisin Tanpa Mikser (No-Churn)
steps: Panaskan rum dalam panci kecil di atas api sedang hingga hangat (jangan sampai mendidih). Angkat dan masukkan kismis serta ekstrak vanila. Diamkan minimal 30 menit. Setelah meresap, tiriskan rum, namun simpan 1/4 cangkir rum untuk dicampurkan ke adonan es krim.
Dalam mangkuk besar, aduk rata susu kental manis, gula palem, kayu manis, allspice, garam, dan sisa rum (1/4 cangkir). Aduk hingga gula larut sepenuhnya.
Dalam mangkuk terpisah, kocok krim kental dingin dengan mikser listrik hingga kaku (stiff peaks).
Masukkan krim kocok ke dalam campuran susu kental manis secara perlahan agar tidak kempis. Masukkan kismis yang sudah direndam rum dan aduk rata.
Tuang adonan ke dalam loyang roti atau wadah tahan beku. Ratakan bagian atas dan tutup dengan plastik atau tutup kedap udara. Bekukan minimal 6 jam atau hingga keras.
Biarkan es krim di suhu ruang selama 5–10 menit sebelum disendok untuk mendapatkan tekstur terbaik.
en_instructions:
Heat the rum in a kecil saucepan over sedang heat until warm (do not boil). Remove from heat and stir in the raisins and vanilla extract. Let the mixture sit for at least 30 minutes. After soaking, drain off the extra rum, but keep ¼ cup of the rum and reserve it to mix into your ice cream base.
In a buah besar bowl, whisk together the sweetened condensed milk, dark brown sugar, cinnamon, allspice, salt, and reserved rum (¼ cup). Stir until the brown sugar is fully dissolved.
In a separate bowl, whip the cold heavy cream with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold the whipped cream into the condensed milk mixture until fully combined, being careful not to deflate the cream. Fold in the drained rum-soaked raisins to distribute them evenly.
Pour the mixture into a loaf pan or freezer-safe container. Smooth the top and cover with plastic wrap or an airtight lid. Freeze for at least 6 hours, or until firm.
Let the ice cream sit at room temperature for 5–10 minutes before scooping for the best texture.

steps: Rendam craisin (cranberry kering), kismis (raisins), dan ceri dalam 1 cangkir bir. Sisihkan dan biarkan terendam selama 30 menit.
Panaskan oven hingga 165 derajat Celsius (325 derajat Fahrenheit). Olesi loyang roti ukuran 20x10 cm. Sisihkan.
Campurkan tepung terigu serbaguna, baking powder, kayu manis bubuk, dan garam dalam mangkuk besar, lalu sisihkan.

Di mangkuk lain, campurkan gula palem, telur, susu, madu, mentega cair, molase, browning (saus gula karamel), ekstrak vanila, dan bir yang digunakan merendam buah. Jangan masukkan buahnya dulu, hanya birnya saja. Aduk hingga rata.
Ambil 2 sendok makan tepung dari campuran tepung dan lumuri buah dengan tepung tersebut. Sisihkan.
Buat lubang di tengah campuran bahan kering dan tuangkan campuran bahan basah, aduk hingga tercampur rata. Masukkan buah-buahan ke dalam adonan dan aduk hingga merata.
Tuang adonan ke dalam loyang roti yang sudah disiapkan dan panggang dalam oven yang sudah dipanaskan selama 50-60 menit atau hingga tusuk gigi yang dimasukkan keluar bersih.
Dinginkan selama 5 menit di dalam loyang lalu pindahkan ke rak kawat hingga benar-benar dingin. Sajikan dengan irisan keju cheddar.
en_instructions:
Soak the craisins, raisins, and cherries in the 1 cup of beer. Set aside and allow to soak for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease an 8x4 loaf pan. Set aside.
Combine all-purpose flour, baking powder, ground cinnamon, salt, in a buah besar bowl and set aside.
In another bowl, combine brown sugar, egg, milk, honey, melted butter, molasses, browning, vanilla extract, and the beer that’s soaking the fruit. Do not pour the fruit in at this time, just the beer. Mix to combine.
Remove 2 sdm of flour from the flour mixture and toss the fruit in it. Set aside.
Make a well in the middle of the bowl of dry ingredients and pour in wet mixture, stirring until fully combined. And the fruits to the mixture and stir until incpororated.
Pour mixture into prepared loaf pan and bake in the preheated oven for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.
Cool for 5 minutes in the pan and then move to a cooling rack to finish cooling. Serve with slices of cheddar cheese.

strMeal: Daging Sapi Kornet dan Kubis – Gaya Jamaika
steps: Panaskan minyak zaitun dalam wajan besar atau panci Belanda di atas api sedang-tinggi. Masukkan bawang bombay dan paprika hijau, tumis selama sekitar 3-5 menit.
Tambahkan bawang putih dan aduk selama sekitar 1 menit.
Masukkan irisan kubis dan aduk. Masak selama sekitar 3-5 menit, aduk sering hingga layu.

Tambahkan daging sapi kornet, tomat Roma, dan timi (thyme), lalu aduk. Masukkan saus tomat dan saus cabai scotch bonnet, lalu aduk. Kecilkan api dan masak dengan api sedang selama sekitar 3-5 menit, hingga daging kornet panas merata. Angkat dari api.
Sajikan dengan nasi putih, roti, atau dimakan langsung.
en_instructions:
Heat olive oil in a skillet or Dutch pot over sedang-high heat. Add onion and green pepper and sauté for about 3-5 minutes.
Add garlic and stir for about 1 minute.
Add shredded cabbage and stir. Cook for about about 3-5 minutes, stirring often until softened.
Add corned beef, Roma tomatoes, and thyme and stir. Add ketchup and scotch bonnet pepper sauce and stir. Reduce heat and cook on sedang for about 3-5 minutes, until the corned beef is heated through. Remove from heat.
Serve with white rice, bread, or on its own.

steps: Lumatkan pisang dengan garpu di dalam mangkuk.
Tambahkan gula palem, ekstrak vanila, kayu manis, pala, dan sejumput garam. Ayak tepung terigu dan aduk dengan sendok hingga tercampur rata.

Panaskan minyak dalam wajan 10 inci di atas api sedang-tinggi. Setelah minyak panas, masukkan adonan fritter pisang sesendok demi sesendok. Setelah satu sisi berwarna emas dan muncul gelembung di atasnya, balik fritter dan masak hingga sisi lainnya berwarna kecokelatan juga.
Angkat fritter dan tiriskan di atas tisu dapur. Nikmati.
en_instructions:
Mash bananas with fork in bowl.
Add brown sugar, vanilla, extract, cinnamon, nutmeg and a sejumput of salt. Sift in flour and stir with spoon until fully combined.
Add oil to a 10 inch skillet over sedang-high heat. Once oil is hot, drop banana fritter batter in oil by the spoonful. Once one side is golden and bubbles appear on the top, flip fritter and cook until the other side is browned as well.
Remove fritters and drain on paper towels. Enjoy

steps: Cuci daging sapi dan potong menjadi potongan besar. Bumbui sedikit dengan garam dan kunyit.
Panaskan minyak samin (ghee) atau minyak dalam panci besar. Tambahkan irisan bawang bombay dan tumis hingga berwarna cokelat keemasan muda.
Tambahkan bawang putih, cabai hijau, dan tomat; masak hingga lunak.
Tambahkan campuran bumbu mandi: ketumbar, jinten, merica hitam, kayu manis, kapulaga, cengkeh, dan daun salam.
Masukkan potongan daging sapi dan aduk di atas api sedang hingga daging terbalut bumbu dengan baik.
Tuangkan air atau kaldu sapi. Tutup dan biarkan mendidih hingga daging sapi empuk (sekitar 1,5–2 jam tergantung jenis potongan daging).
Keluarkan daging sapi dengan hati-hati dan sisihkan. Saring dan ukur kuahnya.
Masukkan beras basmati yang sudah dicuci dan direndam ke dalam kuah (biasanya 1 cangkir beras = 1,5–2 cangkir cairan). Sesuaikan bumbu dan didihkan.
Kecilkan api, tutup, dan masak nasi hingga pulen.
Letakkan potongan daging sapi di atas nasi dan kukus dengan api kecil selama 10 menit agar rasa meresap.
Opsional: Untuk aroma asap, letakkan arang panas kecil di atas kertas aluminium di dalam panci, tambahkan 1 sdt mentega/minyak, segera tutup selama 5 menit. Keluarkan arang sebelum disajikan.
Aduk nasi dan sajikan beef mandi dengan salad atau chutney.
en_instructions:
1. Wash the beef and cut into buah besar pieces. Season lightly with salt and turmeric.
2. Heat ghee/oil in a buah besar pot. Add diiris onions and sauté until light golden.
3. Add garlic, green chilies, and tomato; cook until softened.
4. Add the mandi spice mix: coriander, cumin, black pepper, cinnamon, cardamom, siung, and bay leaves.
5. Add beef pieces and stir on sedang heat until the meat is well coated with spices.
6. Pour in water or beef stock. Cover and simmer until beef is tender (about 1.5–2 hours depending on cut).
7. Remove beef carefully and set aside. Strain and measure the broth.
8. Add washed, soaked basmati rice to the broth (usually 1 cup rice = 1.5–2 cangkir liquid). Adjust seasoning and bring to a boil.
9. Lower heat, cover, and cook the rice until fluffy.
10. Place the beef pieces over the rice and steam on low heat for 10 minutes so flavors combine.
11. Optional: For smoky flavor, place a kecil hot charcoal on foil in the pot, add 1 sdt butter/oil, immediately cover for 5 minutes. Remove coal before serving.
12. Fluff rice and serve beef mandi with salad or chutney.

steps: Masukkan daging asam jawa dan 1 cangkir gula pasir ke dalam mangkuk lalu lumatkan bersama dengan sendok atau garpu. Ambil sedikit campuran asam dan gula lalu bentuk menjadi bola-bola kecil dengan menggulingkannya di tangan Anda. Buat ukuran kelereng atau sedikit lebih besar sesuai selera.
Tambahkan sisa gula ke permukaan yang rata, seperti piring atau loyang. Gulingkan bola asam jawa dalam gula pasir hingga terlapisi dengan baik.

Anda dapat langsung memakan bola asam jawa, atau membiarkannya selama beberapa jam atau semalaman. Membiarkannya akan memberikan tekstur yang lebih padat dan lapisan gula yang lebih mengkristal. Nikmati.
en_instructions:
Add tamarind pulp and 1 cup granulated sugar to a bowl and mash together with a spoon or fork. Take kecil amounts of the tamarind and sugar mix and shape them into kecil balls by rolling them in your hands. Make them the size of a marble or slightly bigger, as you like.
Add the remaining sugar to a flat surface, like a plate or a sheet pan. Roll the tamarind balls in granulated sugar until they're well-coated.
You can eat the tamarind balls immediately, or you can let them set for a few hours or overnight. Allowing them to set will give them a firmer texture and more crystallized sugar coating. Enjoy.

steps: Bumbui daging sapi: Campurkan bahan bumbu rendaman daging (1 sdt kecap asin, 1 sdt arak beras Tiongkok, 1/2 sdt tepung maizena, 1/8 sdt merica hitam) dalam mangkuk sedang.
Masukkan irisan daging sapi dan aduk hingga rata. Diamkan selama 10 menit.
Siapkan saus: Campurkan bahan saus (2 sdm saus tiram, 1 sdt arak beras Tiongkok, 1 sdt kecap asin, 1/4 cangkir kaldu ayam) dalam mangkuk kecil. Sisihkan.
Blansir atau kukus brokoli: Didihkan air dalam panci. Masukkan brokoli dan masak hingga agak empuk tetapi tetap renyah, sekitar 2 menit. Tiriskan hingga benar-benar kering.
Tumis daging sapi: Panaskan wajan besar atau wok di atas api besar sampai setetes air mendesis dan langsung menguap saat disentuh. Tambahkan minyak goreng dan putar wajan agar minyak merata.
Masukkan daging sapi dan segera ratakan ke seluruh permukaan wajan dalam satu lapisan (usahakan tidak saling menumpuk).

Biarkan daging sapi digoreng tanpa diaduk selama 1 menit. Balik irisan daging, tambahkan bawang putih ke wajan, dan tumis selama 30 detik hingga 1 menit lagi sampai daging tidak lagi berwarna merah muda.

Tambahkan saus, maizena, dan brokoli: Tuangkan saus dan larutan maizena (1 sdt tepung maizena dilarutkan dalam 1 sdm air). Aduk hingga saus mendidih dan mengental, sekitar 30 detik. Masukkan brokoli dan aduk rata.
Sajikan segera dengan nasi putih hangat atau dinikmati langsung.
en_instructions:
Marinate the beef:
Stir together the beef marinade ingredients (1 sdt soy sauce, 1 sdt Chinese rice wine, 1/2 sdt cornstarch, 1/8 sdt black pepper) in a sedang bowl.

Add the beef slices and stir until coated. Let stand for 10 minutes.

Prepare the sauce:
Stir together the sauce ingredients (2 sdm oyster sauce, 1 sdt Chinese rice wine, 1 sdt soy sauce, 1/4 cup chicken broth) in a kecil bowl. Set aside.

Blanch or steam the broccoli:
Bring a pot of water to a boil. Add the broccoli and cook until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Drain thoroughly.

Stir-fry the beef:
Heat a buah besar frying pan or wok over high heat until a bead of water sizzles and instantly evaporates upon contact. Add the cooking oil and swirl to coat.

Add the beef and immediately spread it out all over the surface of the wok or pan in a single layer (preferably not touching).

Let the beef fry undisturbed for 1 minute. Flip the beef slices over, add the garlic to the pan, and fry for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute until no longer pink.

Add the sauce, cornstarch, and broccoli:
Pour in the sauce and the cornstarch slurry (1 sdt cornstarch dissolved in 1 sdm of water). Stir until the sauce boils and thickens, about 30 seconds. Stir in the broccoli.

Serve immediately, with steamed rice or on its own.

steps: Panaskan oven hingga 180°C (350°F). Olesi loyang kue dengan mentega dan alasi dengan kertas roti.
Dalam wadah besar, pecahkan empat butir telur bersama gula dan kocok hingga volumenya mengembang tiga kali lipat dan teksturnya menjadi ringan dan mengembang (fluffy).

Ayak tepung terigu self-rising dan tambahkan ke dalam adonan telur. Aduk lipat (fold) perlahan untuk menjaga sebanyak mungkin udara di dalamnya. Tambahkan mentega cair (yang sudah agak dingin) dan aduk hingga tercampur rata.
Tambahkan kayu manis, sejumput garam, dan ekstrak vanila.
Masukkan potongan apel dadu ke dalam adonan dan aduk lipat perlahan agar potongan apel tersebar merata. Anda juga bisa membalur potongan apel dengan sedikit kayu manis tambahan terlebih dahulu.
Tuang adonan ke dalam loyang yang telah disiapkan dan ratakan bagian atasnya dengan spatula.
Letakkan irisan apel di atas adonan dan tekan perlahan. Taburkan irisan kacang almond (opsional) jika suka.
Panggang kue apel di dalam oven yang sudah dipanaskan selama sekitar 45-50 menit, atau hingga tusuk kayu yang dimasukkan ke bagian tengah kue keluar dalam keadaan bersih.
Keluarkan kue dari oven dan biarkan dingin di dalam loyang selama beberapa menit. Kemudian lepaskan kue dari loyang dengan hati-hati dan biarkan dingin sepenuhnya di atas rak kawat.
Taburi kue apel yang sudah dingin dengan gula halus.
en_instructions:
Preheat the oven to 180°C. (350˚F) Grease a cake pan and line it with baking paper.
In a buah besar bowl, break the four eggs with the sugar and beat until they have tripled in volume and become fluffy.
Sift the self-rising baking flour and add it to your egg mixture. Fold this over, preserving as much air as possible. Add the melted (and slightly cooled) butter and mix until combined.
Add cinnamon, sejumput of salt and vanilla extract.
Add the diced apple to the batter and gently fold them into the batter so that the apple pieces are evenly distributed. You can roll the apple pieces through some more cinnamon.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
Place the apple slices on top of the batter and press lightly. Sprinkle optionally with some almond shavings.
Bake the apple cake in the preheated oven for about 45-50 minutes, or until a wooden skewer comes out clean when inserted into the center of the cake.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool in the mold for a few minutes. Then carefully remove the cake from the mold and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Sprinkle the cooled apple cake with powdered sugar

steps: Campurkan tepung terigu self-rising, gula, campuran bumbu speculaas, dan garam. Tambahkan mentega dan susu, lalu uleni hingga menjadi bola adonan yang padat. Mulailah dengan 6 sendok makan susu; jika adonan terlalu kaku, Anda bisa menambahkan lebih banyak susu.
Bungkus adonan dengan plastik wrap dan simpan di lemari es semalaman. Anda bisa langsung mengolah dan memanggangnya, namun rasanya akan jauh lebih enak jika dibiarkan istirahat.
Campurkan pasta almond dengan setengah bagian telur kocok dan uleni dengan baik. Hal ini membuatnya lebih mudah diolah dan memberikan tekstur yang lebih baik serta lebih lezat.

Ambil setengah adonan dan gilas hingga ukuran 20 x 20 cm. Letakkan di loyang yang sudah dialasi kertas roti. Ratakan campuran pasta almond di atasnya. Gilas sisa adonan dan letakkan di atas pasta almond.
Olesi bagian atas dengan sisa telur kocok. Hiasi dengan kacang almond dan olesi kembali dengan sisa telur kocok.
Panggang speculaas isi selama 40 menit pada suhu 180°C/350°F (oven konvensional) atau hingga matang.
en_instructions:
Mix the self-rising flour, sugar, speculaas spice mix and salt. Add the butter and milk and knead into a firm ball of dough. Start with 6 sdm of milk, if the dough is too stiff you can add more milk.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight. You can process and bake it immediately, but the flavor will be much better if you let it rest.
Mix the almond paste with half of the beaten egg and knead well. This makes it easier to work with and gives it a better and tastier texture.
Take half of the dough and roll it out to 20 x 20 cm. Place in a baking pan lined with parchment paper. Spread the almond paste mixture evenly. Roll out the remaining dough and place on top of the almond paste.
Brush the top with the remaining beaten egg. Garnish with almonds and top with another layer of egg wash.
Bake the filled speculaas for 40 minutes at 180°C/350℉ (conventional oven) or until done.

steps: Campurkan susu dan ragi dalam sebuah wadah. Diamkan sejenak agar ragi larut.
Dalam wadah lain, campurkan tepung, mentega, gula, telur, dan garam. Tuangkan campuran ragi dan uleni hingga kalis. Tutup wadah dan biarkan adonan mengembang selama satu jam.

Saat adonan hampir siap, buat isian stroop (sirup). Campurkan semua bahan ke dalam panci dan aduk hingga mentega leleh dan gula larut. Biarkan mendidih sebentar. Sirup stroop akan terus mengental saat mendingin.
Bentuk adonan menjadi bola-bola dengan berat masing-masing sekitar 35 gram. Buat total 14 buah. Nyalakan cetakan stroopwafel pada pengaturan tertinggi.

Letakkan bola adonan di cetakan dan tutup cetakan tersebut. Jangan memipihkan waffle terlalu banyak; Anda harus tetap bisa memotongnya di tengah nanti. Panggang selama 1-2 menit hingga waffle berwarna cokelat keemasan yang cantik.
Saat waffle sudah matang, kerjalah dengan cepat. Keluarkan waffle dari cetakan dan segera gunakan pemotong bulat untuk memotong lingkaran rapi berukuran sekitar 8 hingga 9 cm.
Letakkan waffle yang masih panas di atas papan telenan dan potong secara horizontal (membelah tengah) dengan pisau tajam. Stroopwafel sangat panas, jadi gunakan sarung tangan oven untuk memegangnya.

Ambil setengah bagian waffle dan oleskan sirup stroop (yang masih panas!) di atasnya. Letakkan setengah bagian lainnya di atasnya, tekan perlahan jika perlu, dan letakkan waffle di atas rak kawat hingga dingin. Ulangi untuk semua bola adonan.
en_instructions:
Combine milk and yeast in a bowl. Let stand for a moment to allow the yeast to dissolve.
In another bowl, combine flour, butter, sugar, egg, and salt. Pour in the yeast mixture and knead until smooth. Cover the bowl and let the dough rise for one hour.
When the dough is almost ready, make the stroop filling. Combine all the ingredients in a saucepan and stir until the butter is melted and the sugar is dissolved. Let it simmer for a while. The stroop will continue to thicken as it cools.
Shape the dough into balls weighing about 35 grams each. Make a total of 14. Turn your stroopwafel iron on the highest setting.
Place a ball of dough in the iron and close the iron. Don’t flatten the waffle too much; you should still be able to cut through it. Bake for 1-2 minutes until the waffle is nicely golden brown.
When the waffle is done, work quickly. Remove the waffle from the iron and immediately use a round cutter to cut out a nice circle of about 8 to 9 cm (3 to 3.5 inches).
Place the hot waffle on a cutting board and cut horizontally with a sharp knife. The stroopwafel is very hot, so use an oven mitt to hold it in place.
Take half a waffle and spread the (hot!) stroop on it. Place the other half on top, pressing gently if necessary, and place the waffle on a wire rack to cool. Repeat for all the balls.

steps: Membuat mac and cheese

1. Didihkan panci berukuran sedang berisi air yang diberi banyak garam (sampai terasa seperti air laut). Masukkan pasta dan masak, sesekali diaduk, hingga al dente (sekitar 8 hingga 10 menit, atau sesuai petunjuk kemasan). Pasta harus empuk tapi tetap kenyal saat digigit.
2. Sambil memasak pasta, kocok tepung terigu, bubuk mustard, bubuk bawang putih, garam, lada hitam, dan cabai cayenne dalam mangkuk kecil.

3. Tiriskan pasta dalam saringan. Letakkan kembali panci bekas memasak pasta di atas api kecil (tidak perlu dicuci) dan masukkan mentega. Setelah mentega leleh, masukkan campuran tepung dan terus masak sambil sering dikocok hingga campuran mulai berwarna kecokelatan dan beraroma kacang yang harum, sekitar 1 menit. Perhatikan baik-baik agar tidak gosong di bagian bawah panci.

4. Tuangkan susu dan krim secara perlahan ke dalam campuran tepung sambil dikocok hingga semuanya tercampur rata. Masak sambil terus dikocok hingga saus panas merata dan mulai mengental, sekitar 2 menit. Angkat dari api. Masukkan keju secara bertahap sambil terus diaduk dengan sendok kayu atau spatula silikon hingga keju meleleh ke dalam saus. Kemudian masukkan pasta yang sudah ditiriskan.

5. Lapisi loyang berukuran 23x33 cm dengan kertas roti atau aluminium foil. Semprot kertas atau foil dengan minyak antilengket atau olesi dengan mentega. Tuang mac and cheese yang masih hangat ke atas loyang dan ratakan dengan spatula. Olesi selembar kertas roti lagi dengan minyak atau mentega dan letakkan (sisi yang berminyak menghadap ke bawah) tepat di atas permukaan mac and cheese. Simpan di lemari es hingga dingin dan padat, sekitar 1 jam.
Membuat sandwich keju panggang (grilled cheese)
6. Panaskan wajan besi besar atau wajan antilengket di atas api sedang-kecil.
7. Dalam mangkuk kecil, campurkan 4 sendok makan (55 gram) mentega dan bubuk bawang putih hingga tercampur rata.

8. Keluarkan mac and cheese dari lemari es dan lepaskan lapisan atas kertas roti. Potong dengan hati-hati menjadi 8 bagian yang sama besar. Setiap bagian akan menjadi 1 sandwich mac and cheese panggang. (Anda bisa menyimpan setiap porsi dalam kantong plastik klip dan simpan di lemari es hingga 3 hari atau bekukan hingga 1 bulan.)

9. Oleskan 3/4 sendok teh mentega bawang putih pada satu sisi setiap irisan roti. Letakkan setengah bagian irisan roti (sisi yang bermentega menghadap ke bawah) di atas papan telenan. Beri satu lapis keju Cheddar di atasnya, lalu satu potong mac and cheese. Beri satu lapis keju Jack di atasnya. Tutup dengan sisa irisan roti (sisi yang bermentega menghadap ke atas).

10. Menggunakan spatula lebar, tata sandwich di wajan (secukupnya agar tidak terlalu sesak). Tutup dan masak hingga bagian bawah berwarna cokelat cantik, sekitar 4 menit. Balik dan masak hingga sisi kedua berwarna cokelat, keju meleleh, dan mac and cheese panas merata, sekitar 4 menit lagi.
11. Ulangi dengan sisa bahan lainnya. Potong sandwich menjadi dua jika suka, dan sajikan.
en_instructions:
Make the mac and cheese

1. Bring a sedang saucepan of generously salted water (you want it secukupnya like seawater) to a boil. Add the pasta and cook, stirring occasionally, until al dente, 8 to 10 minutes, or according to the package directions. The pasta should be tender but still chewy.
2. While the pasta is cooking, in a kecil bowl, whisk together the flour, mustard powder, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
3. Drain the pasta in a colander. Place the empty pasta pan (no need to wash it) over low heat and add the butter. When the butter has melted, whisk in the flour mixture and continue to cook, whisking frequently, until the mixture is beginning to brown and has a pleasant, nutty aroma, about 1 minute. Watch carefully so it does not scorch on the bottom of the pan.
4. Slowly whisk the milk and cream into the flour mixture until everything is really well combined. Cook, whisking constantly, until the sauce is heated through and just begins to thicken, about 2 minutes. Remove from the heat. Gradually add the cheese while stirring constantly with a wooden spoon or silicone spatula and keep stirring until the cheese has melted into the sauce. Then stir in the drained cooked pasta.
5. Line a 9-by-13-inch (23-by-33-centimeter) rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper or aluminum foil. Coat the paper or foil with nonstick cooking spray or slick it with butter. Pour the warm mac and cheese onto the prepared baking sheet and spread it evenly with a spatula. Coat another piece of parchment paper with cooking spray or butter and place it, oiled or buttered side down, directly on the surface of the mac and cheese. Refrigerate until cool and firm, about 1 hour.

Make the grilled cheese
6. Heat a buah besar cast-iron or nonstick skillet over sedang-low heat.
7. In a kecil bowl, stir together the 4 sdm (55 grams) butter and garlic powder until well blended.
8. Remove the mac and cheese from the refrigerator and peel off the top layer of parchment paper. Carefully cut into 8 equal pieces. Each piece will make 1 grilled mac and cheese sandwich. (You can stash each individual portion in a double layer of resealable plastic bags and refrigerate for up to 3 days or freeze it for up to 1 month.)
9. Spread 3/4 sdt garlic butter on one side of each bread slice. Place half of the slices, buttered-side down, on a clean cutting board. Top each with one slice of Cheddar, then 1 piece of the mac and cheese. (Transfer from the baking sheet by scooting your hand or a spatula under each piece of mac and cheese and then flipping it over onto a sandwich.) Place 1 slice of Jack on top of each. Finish with the remaining bread slices, buttered-side up.
10. Using a wide spatula, place as many sandwiches in the pan as will fit without crowding it. Cover and cook until the bottoms are nicely browned, about 4 minutes. Turn and cook until the second sides are browned, the cheese is melted, and the mac and cheese is heated through, about 4 minutes more.
11. Repeat with the remaining ingredients. Cut the sandwiches in half, if desired, and serve.

steps: Dalam panci berukuran sedang, aduk clotted cream, mentega, dan tepung maizena di atas api kecil hingga sedang dan biarkan hingga mendidih perlahan (simmer). Matikan api dan jaga agar tetap hangat.
Sementara itu, masukkan keju dan pala ke dalam mangkuk kecil dan tambahkan lada hitam secukupnya, lalu aduk semuanya menjadi satu (jangan tambahkan garam pada tahap ini).

Masukkan pasta ke dalam panci lain dengan 2 sdt garam, tuangkan air mendidih dan masak sesuai petunjuk kemasan (biasanya 3-4 menit). Setelah matang, ambil sedikit air rebusan pasta ke dalam gelas atau cangkir tahan panas, lalu tiriskan pasta (tapi jangan terlalu kering).

Masukkan pasta ke dalam panci berisi campuran clotted cream, lalu taburkan keju di atasnya dan aduk lipat perlahan semuanya di atas api kecil menggunakan spatula karet. Setelah tercampur, masukkan 3 sdm air rebusan pasta. Awalnya, pasta akan terlihat basah dan encer: teruslah mengaduk hingga air terserap dan sausnya menjadi mengkilap (glossy). Cicipi rasanya sebelum dipindahkan ke mangkuk yang sudah dipanaskan. Taburkan kucai atau peterseli, lalu sajikan segera.
en_instructions:
In a sedang saucepan, stir the clotted cream, butter and cornflour over a low-ish heat and bring to a low simmer. Turn off the heat and keep warm.
Meanwhile, put the cheese and nutmeg in a kecil bowl and add a good grinding of black pepper, then stir everything together (don’t add any salt at this stage).
Put the pasta in another pan with 2 sdt salt, pour over some boiling water and cook following pack instructions (usually 3-4 mins). When cooked, scoop some of the cooking water into a heatproof jug or mug and drain the pasta, but not too thoroughly.
Add the pasta to the pan with the clotted cream mixture, then sprinkle over the cheese and gently fold everything together over a low heat using a rubber spatula. When combined, splash in 3 sdtp of the cooking water. At first, the pasta will look wet and sloppy: keep stirring until the water is absorbed and the sauce is glossy. Check the seasoning before transferring to heated bowls. Sprinkle over some chives or parsley, then serve immediately.

steps: Masak pasta sesuai petunjuk kemasan. Panaskan minyak dalam wajan antilengket dan tumis bawang bombay, bawang putih, dan cabai selama 3-4 menit hingga layu. Masukkan pasta tomat (puree) dan masak selama 1 menit, lalu tambahkan ikan sarden beserta sausnya. Masak sambil menghancurkan ikan dengan sendok kayu, lalu tambahkan zaitun dan terus masak selama beberapa menit lagi.
Tiriskan pasta dan masukkan ke wajan bersama 2-3 sdm air rebusan pasta. Aduk rata semuanya, lalu sajikan di piring dengan taburan keju Parmesan.
en_instructions:
Cook the pasta following pack instructions. Heat the oil in a non-stick frying pan and cook the onion, garlic and chilli for 3-4 mins to soften. Stir in the tomato purée and cook for 1 min, then add the pilchards with their sauce. Cook, breaking up the fish with a wooden spoon, then add the olives and continue to cook for a few more mins.

Drain the pasta and add to the pan with 2-3 sdtp of the cooking water. Toss everything together well, then divide between plates and serve, scattered with Parmesan.

steps: Campurkan bahan saus (dressing) dalam mangkuk kecil, bumbui dengan garam dan merica. Sisihkan.
Masak pasta sesuai petunjuk kemasan. Tambahkan kacang kapri manis pada menit terakhir waktu memasak.

Sementara itu, panaskan minyak dalam wajan besar atau wok, masukkan bawang putih dan cabai, masak dengan api kecil selama sekitar 30 detik tanpa membuat bawang putih menjadi cokelat. Masukkan udang dan masak dengan api besar sambil sering diaduk selama sekitar 3 menit hingga berubah warna menjadi merah muda.

Tambahkan tomat dan masak sambil sesekali diaduk selama 3 menit hingga mulai layu. Tiriskan pasta dan kacang kapri, lalu masukkan ke dalam campuran udang. Masukkan daun basil yang sudah disobek, aduk, dan bumbui dengan garam serta merica.
Sajikan dengan daun selada yang disiram saus jeruk nipis, dan roti kerak (crusty bread) yang hangat.
en_instructions:
Mix the dressing ingredients in a kecil bowl and season with salt and pepper. Set aside.

Cook the pasta according to the packet instructions. Add the sugar snap peas for the last minute or so of cooking time.

Meanwhile, heat the oil in a wok or buah besar frying pan, toss in the garlic and chilli and cook over a fairly gentle heat for about 30 seconds without letting the garlic brown. Tip in the prawns and cook over a high heat, stirring frequently, for about 3 minutes until they turn pink.

Add the tomatoes and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3 minutes until they just start to soften. Drain the pasta and sugar snaps well, then toss into the prawn mixture. Tear in the basil leaves, stir, and season with salt and pepper.

Serve with salad leaves disiram tipis-tipisd with the lime dressing, and warm crusty bread.

steps: Panaskan minyak dalam panci besar. Gunakan gunting dapur untuk memotong bacon menjadi potongan kecil, atau gunakan pisau tajam untuk mencincangnya di atas telenan. Masukkan bacon ke panci dan masak selama beberapa menit hingga mulai berwarna keemasan. Tambahkan bawang bombay, seledri, dan wortel, masak dengan api sedang selama 5 menit sambil sesekali diaduk hingga layu.
Tambahkan bawang putih dan masak selama 1 menit, lalu masukkan daging giling dan masak sambil diaduk serta dihancurkan dengan sendok kayu selama sekitar 6 menit hingga kecokelatan merata.

Masukkan pasta tomat dan masak selama 1 menit, aduk rata dengan daging dan sayuran. Masukkan tomat cincang. Isi setiap kaleng tomat dengan air hingga setengah penuh untuk membilas sisa tomat di dalamnya, lalu tuangkan ke panci. Tambahkan madu dan bumbui sesuai selera. Rebus perlahan (simmer) selama 20 menit.

Panaskan oven ke suhu 200°C (180°C untuk oven kipas). Untuk menyusun lasagne, tuangkan sedikit saus ragu ke dasar loyang panggangan, ratakan ke seluruh dasar loyang. Letakkan 2 lembar lasagna di atas saus (tumpuk sedikit jika perlu agar pas), lalu ulangi dengan lebih banyak saus dan lapisan pasta lainnya. Ulangi hingga total 4 lapisan saus dan pasta, akhiri dengan lapisan pasta.

Masukkan crème fraîche ke dalam mangkuk dan campur dengan 2 sdm air agar lebih encer dan menjadi saus halus yang bisa dituang. Tuangkan ini ke atas pasta, lalu beri taburan mozzarella. Taburkan Parmesan di atasnya dan panggang selama 25–30 menit hingga berwarna keemasan dan mendidih. Sajikan dengan taburan basil jika suka.
en_instructions:
Heat the oil in a buah besar saucepan. Use kitchen scissors to snip the bacon into kecil pieces, or use a sharp knife to chop it on a chopping board. Add the bacon to the pan and cook for just a few mins until starting to turn golden. Add the onion, celery and carrot, and cook over a sedang heat for 5 mins, stirring occasionally, until softened.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 min, then tip in the mince and cook, stirring and breaking it up with a wooden spoon, for about 6 mins until browned all over.
Stir in the tomato purée and cook for 1 min, mixing in well with the beef and vegetables. Tip in the cincang tomatoes. Fill each can half full with water to rinse out any tomatoes left in the can, and add to the pan. Add the honey and season secukupnya. Simmer for 20 mins.
Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6. To assemble the lasagne, ladle a little of the ragu sauce into the bottom of the roasting tin or casserole dish, spreading the sauce all over the base. Place 2 sheets of lasagne on top of the sauce overlapping to make it fit, then repeat with more sauce and another layer of pasta. Repeat with a further 2 layers of sauce and pasta, finishing with a layer of pasta.
Put the crème fraîche in a bowl and mix with 2 sdtp water to loosen it and make a smooth pourable sauce. Pour this over the top of the pasta, then top with the mozzarella. Sprinkle Parmesan over the top and bake for 25–30 mins until golden and bubbling. Serve scattered with basil, if you like.

steps: Lelehkan mentega dengan minyak dalam panci besar berdasar tebal. Masukkan bawang bombay dan goreng dengan tutup panci terpasang selama 10 menit hingga lunak. Taburkan gula dan masak selama 20 menit lagi sambil sering diaduk hingga terkaramelisasi. Bawang harus berwarna keemasan, kaya rasa, dan lunak saat ditekan. Berhati-hatilah menjelang akhir agar tidak gosong.

Tambahkan bawang putih pada menit terakhir waktu memasak bawang, lalu taburkan tepung terigu dan aduk rata. Tingkatkan api dan terus aduk sambil menuangkan anggur secara bertahap, diikuti dengan kaldu panas. Tutup dan rebus perlahan selama 15-20 menit.

Untuk penyajian, nyalakan pemanggang (grill) dan panggang roti. Tuangkan sup ke dalam mangkuk tahan panas. Letakkan satu atau dua irisan roti panggang di atas mangkuk sup, dan tumpuk keju di atasnya. Panggang hingga keju meleleh. Sebagai alternatif, Anda bisa menyelesaikan panggang roti dengan keju di bawah grill, lalu letakkan di atas sup.
en_instructions:
Melt the butter with the oil in a buah besar heavy-based pan. Add the onions and fry with the lid on for 10 mins until soft. Sprinkle in the sugar and cook for 20 mins more, stirring frequently, until caramelised. The onions should be really golden, full of flavour and soft when sejumputed between your fingers. Take care towards the end to ensure that they don’t burn.
Add the garlic for the final few mins of the onions’ cooking time, then sprinkle in the flour and stir well. Increase the heat and keep stirring as you gradually add the wine, followed by the hot stock. Cover and simmer for 15-20 mins.
disiram tipis-tipis, turn on the grill, and toast the bread. Ladle the soup into heatproof bowls. Put a slice or two of toast on top of the bowls of soup, and pile on the cheese. Grill until melted. Alternatively, you can complete the toasts under the grill, then serve them on top.

steps: Campurkan tepung, 1 sdt garam, gula halus, ragi, susu, dan telur dalam mixer menggunakan alat pengaduk adonan selama 5 menit hingga adonan halus. Tambahkan mentega dan aduk selama 4 menit lagi dengan kecepatan sedang. Kerok pinggiran wadah adonan dan aduk lagi selama 1 menit. Masukkan adonan ke dalam wadah, tutup dengan plastik wrap dan biarkan di lemari es setidaknya selama 6 jam sebelum digunakan.

Bungkus keju Brie dengan prosciutto dan sisihkan. Letakkan adonan di atas permukaan yang sudah ditaburi sedikit tepung. Gilas menjadi lingkaran berdiameter 25 cm. Letakkan Brie yang sudah dibungkus di tengah lingkaran dan lipat pinggirannya dengan rapi. Letakkan bungkusan tersebut di atas loyang yang sudah dialasi kertas roti dan olesi dengan telur kocok. Dinginkan di lemari es selama 30 menit, lalu olesi lagi dengan telur kocok dan dinginkan kembali selama 30 menit. Biarkan mengembang selama 1 jam pada suhu kamar. Panaskan oven ke 200°C (180°C oven kipas), lalu panggang selama 22 menit. Sajikan hangat.
en_instructions:
Mix the flour, 1 sdt salt, caster sugar, yeast, milk and eggs together in a mixer using the dough attachment for 5 mins until the dough is smooth. Add the butter and mix for a further 4 mins on sedang speed. Scrape the dough bowl and mix again for 1 min. Place the dough in a container, cover with cling film and leave in the fridge for at least 6 hrs before using.
Wrap the Brie in the prosciutto and set aside. Turn out the dough onto a lightly floured surface. Roll into a 25cm circle. Place the wrapped Brie in the middle of the circle and fold the edges in neatly. Put the parcel onto a baking tray lined with baking parchment and brush with beaten egg. Chill in the fridge for 30 mins, then brush again with beaten egg and chill for a further 30 mins. Leave to rise for 1 hr at room temperature. Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6, then bake for 22 mins. Serve warm.

steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 200°C (180°C untuk oven kipas). Tumis bawang bombay dan setangkai thyme dalam minyak hingga layu dan sedikit berwarna (sekitar 5 menit).

Ratakan satu lapis kentang di dasar loyang gratin berukuran 1,5 liter yang sudah diolesi minyak. Taburkan sedikit bawang bombay di atasnya dan teruskan berlapis-lapis, akhiri dengan lapisan kentang. Tuangkan kaldu dan panggang selama 50-60 menit hingga kentang matang serta bagian atasnya berwarna keemasan dan renyah.
