Basahi ujung jari dengan air dan oleskan di sekitar tepi kulit. Kemudian lipat tepi kulit ke atas tengah dan mulailah menggulung egg roll menjauh dari Anda untuk membentuk silinder yang rapat. Letakkan di piring dan ulangi sampai isian habis. Anda akan mendapatkan setidaknya selusin egg roll.
Goreng egg roll dengan air fryer:

Letakkan egg roll di dalam keranjang air fryer Anda. Semprot atau olesi ringan dengan minyak. Masukkan sebanyak mungkin tanpa menumpuk egg roll, pastikan tidak saling bersentuhan. Udara harus bersirkulasi di sekitarnya. Olesi egg roll ringan dengan minyak.

Masukkan keranjang ke dalam air fryer dan atur ke suhu 350°F. Masak selama 6 hingga 7 menit, lalu balik egg roll, semprot atau olesi dengan minyak untuk kedua kalinya di sisi bawah, dan masak selama 4 hingga 5 menit lagi.
Egg roll yang sudah jadi harus berwarna cokelat keemasan dan renyah! Sajikan segera.
en_instructions:
Alternative Pan Fry Method: If you don’t have access to an air fryer, you can make these egg rolls using a traditional pan fry method. Add enough oil to a sedang skillet with high walls so the oil is about 1/2 inch up the side of the skillet. Heat oil on sedang high heat until it reaches 350°F. Add egg rolls and fry for 3 to 4 minutes, flip, and fry for another 3 to 4 minutes until golden brown. Remove and let them drain and cool on a few paper towels.

Cook the filling:
In a buah besar skillet over sedang heat, add the olive oil along with the ground pork or chicken. Break apart the meat with a spatula or wooden spoon as it cooks. Cook until the meat is cooked through, 6 to 8 minutes.

Add garlic, ginger, carrot, scallions, and cabbage. Continue to cook until cabbage wilts down and is soft, another 3 to 4 minutes, stirring regularly. Season the filling with soy sauce and rice wine vinegar, and take off the heat to cool. (This filling can be made in advance.)

Assemble the egg rolls:
Place a single egg roll wrapper on a dry surface with one point of the square facing you (like a diamond). Place about 1/4 cup of the egg roll filling mixture in the middle of the wrapper.

Dip your fingers in water and run around the edges of the wrapper. Then fold the edges of the wrapper over the center and start rolling the egg roll away from you to form a tight cylinder. Place on a plate and repeat until you are out of filling. You should get at least a dozen egg rolls.

Air fry the egg rolls:
Place the egg rolls in the basket of your air fryer. Spray or brush them lightly with oil. Add as many as you can without stacking the egg rolls, making sure they don’t touch. Air needs to circulate around them. Brush the egg rolls lightly with oil.

Place the basket in the air fryer and turn the air fryer to 350°F. Cook for 6 to 7 minutes, then flip the egg rolls, spray or brush with oil a second time on the bottom side, and cook for another 4 to 5 minutes.

Finished egg rolls should be golden brown and crispy! Serve immediately.

steps: Menyiapkan timun:
Kupas timun. Potong menjadi empat bagian secara memanjang. (Jika bijinya pahit, kerok dan buang bijinya.) Potong lagi timun secara melintang menjadi potongan setebal 1/2 inci.
Mengaduk salad:

Masukkan timun ke dalam mangkuk saji. Taburi dengan garam. Aduk dengan minyak wijen, cuka beras berbumbu, kemangi (jika menggunakan), dan serpihan cabai. Taburi dengan biji wijen sangrai jika menggunakan.
en_instructions:
Prep the cucumbers:
Peel the cucumbers. Cut them into quarters, lengthwise. (If the seeds are bitter, scrape out the seeds and discard.) Cut the cucumbers again, crosswise, into 1/2-inch thick pieces.

Toss the salad:
Place cucumbers into a serving bowl. Sprinkle with salt. Toss with sesame oil, seasoned rice vinegar, basil (if using), and chili flakes. Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds if using.

steps: Masukkan udang ke dalam panci dan tambahkan air secukupnya hingga terendam. Rebus selama 5 menit. Tiriskan, sisihkan air rebusannya, dan biarkan udang.

Panaskan 2 sendok makan minyak dalam panci saus. Masukkan bawang bombay; masak dan aduk hingga lunak. Masukkan peterseli, anggur putih, tomat, bawang putih, dan sisa minyak zaitun. Didihkan perlahan (simmer), sering diaduk, selama sekitar 30 menit, atau hingga saus mengental.
While the sauce is simmering, the prawns should become cool enough to handle. First remove the legs by sejumputing them, and then pull off the shells, leaving the head and tail on.

When the sauce has thickened, stir in the prawns. Bring to a simmer again if the sauce has cooled with the prawns, and cook for about 5 minutes. Add the feta and remove from the heat. Let stand until the cheese starts to melt. Serve warm with slices of crusty bread.
Though completely untraditional, you can add a few sdm of stock or passata to this recipe to make a delicious pasta sauce. Toss with pasta after adding the feta, and serve.
en_instructions:
Place the prawns in a pot and add enough water to cover. Boil for 5 minutes. Drain, reserving the liquid, and set aside.
Heat 2 sdm of oil in a saucepan. Add the onion; cook and stir until soft. Mix in the parsley, wine, tomatoes, garlic and remaining olive oil. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for about 30 minutes, or until the sauce is thickened.
While the sauce is simmering, the prawns should become cool enough to handle. First remove the legs by sejumputing them, and then pull off the shells, leaving the head and tail on.
When the sauce has thickened, stir in the prawns. Bring to a simmer again if the sauce has cooled with the prawns, and cook for about 5 minutes. Add the feta and remove from the heat. Let stand until the cheese starts to melt. Serve warm with slices of crusty bread.
Though completely untraditional, you can add a few sdm of stock or passata to this recipe to make a delicious pasta sauce. Toss with pasta after adding the feta, and serve.

steps: Campurkannya semua bahan untuk Honey Teriyaki Glaze. Kocok hingga tercampur rata. Gabungkan salmon dan saus Glaze tersebut.
Panaskan wajan dengan api sedang-rendah. Tambahkan minyak, goreng salmon di kedua sisi hingga benar-benar matang di bagian dalam dan saus mengental.
Hiasi dengan wijen dan sajikan segera.
en_instructions:
Mix all the ingredients in the Honey Teriyaki Glaze together. Whisk to blend well. Combine the salmon and the Glaze together.

Heat up a skillet on sedang-low heat. Add the oil, Pan-fry the salmon on both sides until it’s completely cooked inside and the glaze thickens.

Garnish with sesame and serve immediately.

steps: 1) Panaskan oven ke suhu 180 derajat Celcius.

2) Rebus sayuran selama 5-7 menit hingga lunak. Tambahkan lentil dan masak hingga mendidih perlahan, tambahkan kaldu blok jika diinginkan. Lanjutkan memasak dan mengaduk hingga lentil lunak, sekitar 20 menit.
3) Rebus sebentar (blanch) daun bayam dalam panci selama beberapa menit, sebelum diangkat dan disisihkan.
4) Isi kembali panci dengan air dan masak lembaran lasagna. Setelah matang, tiriskan dan sisihkan.

5) Untuk membuat saus, lelehkan mentega dan tambahkan tepung, lalu tuangkan susu kedelai secara bertahap bersama dengan mustard dan cuka. Masak dan aduk hingga halus lalu susun lasagna sesuai keinginan dalam loyang panggangan.
6) Panggang dalam oven yang sudah dipanaskan selama sekitar 25 menit.
en_instructions:
1) Preheat oven to 180 degrees celcius. 
2) Boil vegetables for 5-7 minutes, until soft. Add lentils and bring to a gentle simmer, adding a stock cube if desired. Continue cooking and stirring until the lentils are soft, which should take about 20 minutes. 
3) Blanch spinach leaves for a few minutes in a pan, before removing and setting aside. 
4) Top up the pan with water and cook the lasagne sheets. When cooked, drain and set aside.
5) To make the sauce, melt the butter and add the flour, then gradually add the soya milk along with the mustard and the vinegar. Cook and stir until smooth and then assemble the lasagne as desired in a baking dish. 
6) Bake in the preheated oven for about 25 minutes.

steps: Didihkan sepanci besar air garam.
Masukkan pasta, aduk sekali dan masak selama sekitar 10 menit atau sesuai petunjuk pada kemasan.
Sementara itu, cuci tomat dan potong menjadi empat bagian. Iris zaitun. Cuci kemangi.
Masukkan tomat ke dalam mangkuk salad dan sobek-sobek daun kemangi di atasnya. Tambahkan satu sendok makan minyak zaitun dan aduk.
Saat pasta sudah matang, tiriskan dalam saringan dan siram dengan air dingin agar cepat dingin.
Masukkan pasta ke dalam mangkuk salad berisi tomat dan kemangi.
Tambahkan irisan zaitun, bola mozzarella yang sudah ditiriskan, dan potongan tuna. Aduk rata dan biarkan salad beristirahat selama setidaknya setengah jam agar bumbu meresap.
Taburi pasta dengan gilingan lada hitam secukupnya dan percikkan sisa minyak zaitun tepat sebelum disajikan.
en_instructions:
Bring a buah besar saucepan of salted water to the boil
Add the pasta, stir once and cook for about 10 minutes or as directed on the packet.
Meanwhile, wash the tomatoes and cut into quarters. Slice the olives. Wash the basil.
Put the tomatoes into a salad bowl and tear the basil leaves over them. Add a sdm of olive oil and mix.
When the pasta is ready, drain into a colander and run cold water over it to cool it quickly.
Toss the pasta into the salad bowl with the tomatoes and basil.
Add the diiris olives, drained mozzarella balls, and chunks of tuna. Mix well and let the salad rest for at least half an hour to allow the flavours to mingle.
Sprinkle the pasta with a generous grind of black pepper and disiram tipis-tipis with the remaining olive oil just before serving.

steps: Cukup campurkan semua bahan kering dengan bahan basah dan aduk hingga rata. Panggang selama 45 menit pada suhu 180 derajat. Hiasi dengan cokelat vegan yang dilelehkan.
en_instructions: Simply mix all dry ingredients with wet ingredients and blend altogether. Bake for 45 min on 180 degrees. Decorate with some melted vegan chocolate

steps: 01. Masukkan kentang ke dalam panci besar berisi air garam dingin dan didihkan. Kecilkan api, tutup, lalu rebus perlahan selama 15 menit hingga empuk. Tiriskan, lalu kembalikan ke panci di atas api kecil selama 30 detik untuk menghilangkan sisa air. Haluskan dengan 1 sdm minyak zaitun, lalu bumbui.

02. Sementara itu, masukkan susu ke dalam wajan besar, tambahkan ikan dan didihkan. Angkat dari api, tutup dan diamkan selama 3 menit. Angkat ikan (sisihkan susunya) dan tepuk-tepuk hingga kering dengan tisu dapur, lalu suwir-suwir perlahan ke dalam pinggan tahan panas, buang kulit dan durinya.

03. Panaskan sisa minyak dalam wajan, masukkan tepung dan masak selama 30 detik. Secara bertahap masukkan 200-250ml susu yang disisihkan tadi (buang sisanya). Parut pala di atasnya, bumbui, lalu masak hingga mendidih dan mengental. Campurkan krim.

04. Panaskan oven ke suhu 190°C/fan 170°C/gas 5. Parut artichoke dan masukkan ke dalam pinggan bersama daun bawang, udang, dan rempah-rempah. Aduk parutan kulit lemon dan jus lemon ke dalam saus, lalu tuangkan ke atas ikan. Aduk perlahan dengan sendok kayu.

05. Sendokkan kentang halus ke atas campuran ikan, lalu gunakan garpu untuk membuat tekstur puncak, yang akan menjadi renyah dan kecokelatan saat dimasak. Taburkan keju di atasnya, lalu panggang selama 35-40 menit hingga berwarna keemasan dan meletup-letup. Sajikan dengan sayuran hijau.
en_instructions:
01.Put the potatoes in a buah besar pan of cold salted water and bring to the boil. Lower the heat, cover, then simmer gently for 15 minutes until tender. Drain, then return to the pan over a low heat for 30 seconds to drive off any excess water. Mash with 1 sdtp olive oil, then season.
02.Meanwhile put the milk in a buah besar sauté pan, add the fish and bring to the boil. Remove from the heat, cover and stand for 3 minutes. Remove the fish (reserving the milk) and pat dry with kitchen paper, then gently flake into an ovenproof dish, discarding the skin and any bones.
03.Heat the remaining oil in a pan, stir in the flour and cook for 30 seconds. Gradually stir in 200-250ml of the reserved milk (discard the rest). Grate in nutmeg, season, then bubble until thick. Stir in the cream.
04.Preheat the oven to 190°C/fan170°C/gas 5. Grate the artichokes and add to the dish with the leek, prawns and herbs. Stir the lemon zest and juice into the sauce, then pour over. Mix gently with a wooden spoon.
05.Spoon the mash onto the fish mixture, then use a fork to make peaks, which will crisp and brown as it cooks. Sprinkle over the cheese, then bake for 35-40 minutes until golden and bubbling. Serve with wilted greens.

steps: Rendam semua rempah, jahe, bawang putih, daging asam jawa, dan cabai Kashmiri (kecuali minyak) dalam cuka.
Tambahkan gula dan garam.
Tambahkan juga bubuk kunyit.
Campurkan semuanya dengan baik dan marinasi selama 35-40 menit.

Giling campuran tersebut hingga lembut dan halus. Tambahkan lebih banyak cuka jika diperlukan tetapi pastikan pasta harus kental sehingga tambahkan cuka sesuai kebutuhan. Jika pasta masala encer maka tidak akan menempel pada ikan.
Bilas ikan, belah bagian tengahnya dan berikan beberapa sayatan di bagian atasnya.
Sekarang masukkan pasta ke bagian tengah dan ke dalam sayatan. Lapisi seluruh ikan dengan pasta ini. Marinasi ikan selama 30 menit.
Masukkan minyak ke dalam wajan datar, setelah minyak cukup panas, goreng dangkal makarel yang sudah diisi tersebut.
Goreng hingga berwarna cokelat keemasan di kedua sisi.
Sajikani makarel recheado panas-panas dengan salad, irisan jeruk nipis, nasi, dan kari.
Catatan
1. Pastikan pasta masala kental jika tidak hasilnya tidak akan bagus.
2. Jika Anda tidak dapat menemukan cabai Kashmiri, gunakan cabai Bedgi atau bubuk cabai merah Kashmiri.
3. Anda bisa menggunakan cuka putih atau cuka kelapa.
4. Pasta yang tersisa bisa disimpan di lemari es untuk penggunaan di masa mendatang.
5. Kayu manis bisa dihindari karena merupakan rempah yang kuat yang umumnya digunakan untuk daging atau ayam.
en_instructions:
Soak all the spices, ginger, garlic, tamarind pulp and kashmiri chilies except oil in vinegar.
Add sugar and salt.
Also add turmeric powder.
Combine all nicely and marinate for 35-40 mins.
Grind the mixture until soft and smooth. Add more vinegar if required but ensure the paste has to be thick so add vinegar accordingly. If the masala paste is thin then it would not stick to the fish.
Rinse the fish slit from the center and give some incision from the top. You could see the fish below for clarity.
Now stuff the paste into the center and into the incision. Coat the entire fish with this paste. Marinate the fish for 30 mins.
Place oil in a shallow pan, once oil is quite hot shallow fry the stuffed mackerels.
Fry until golden brown from both sides
Serve the recheado mackerels hot with salad, lime wedges, rice and curry.
Notes
1. Ensure the masala paste is thick else the result won't be good.
2. If you aren't able to find kashmiri chilies then use bedgi chilies or kashmiri red chili powder.
3. You could use white vinegar or coconut vinegar.
4. Any left over paste could be stored in the fridge for future use.
5. Cinnamon could be avoided as it's a strong spice used generally for meat or chicken.

steps: Memasak dalam bumbu marinasi rempah Cajun dan cabai cayenne membuat ikan ini sangat lezat dan beraroma. Lengkapi dengan saus yang segar dan sajikan dalam tortilla untuk hidangan utama yang cepat, praktis, dan sangat cocok untuk suasana musim panas.
Di atas piring besar, campurkan rempah Cajun dan cabai cayenne dengan sedikit bumbu dan gunakan untuk melapisi seluruh bagian ikan.

Panaskan sedikit minyak dalam wajan, masukkan ikan dan masak dengan api sedang hingga berwarna keemasan. Kecilkan api dan lanjutkan menggoreng hingga ikan matang sempurna, sekitar 10 menit. Masak secara bertahap jika wajan tidak cukup luas.
Sementara itu, siapkan saus dressing dengan mencampurkan semua bahan dengan sedikit bumbu.

Lunakkan tortilla dengan memanaskannya dalam microwave selama 5-10 detik. Tumpuk alpukat, selada, dan daun bawang di atasnya, tambahkan sesendok salsa, lengkapi dengan suwiran besar ikan dan percikkan saus dressing di atasnya.
en_instructions:
Cooking in a cajun spice and cayenne pepper marinade makes this fish super succulent and flavoursome. Top with a zesty dressing and serve in a tortilla for a quick, fuss-free main that's delightfully summery.

On a buah besar plate, mix the cajun spice and cayenne pepper with a little seasoning and use to coat the fish all over.

Heat a little oil in a frying pan, add in the fish and cook over a sedang heat until golden. Reduce the heat and continue frying until the fish is cooked through, about 10 minutes. Cook in batches if you don’t have enough room in the pan.

Meanwhile, prepare the dressing by combining all the ingredients with a little seasoning.
Soften the tortillas by heating in the microwave for 5-10 seconds. Pile high with the avocado, lettuce and spring onion, add a spoonful of salsa, top with buah besar flakes of fish and disiram tipis-tipis over the dressing.

steps: Panaskan minyak dalam panci saus ukuran sedang dan masukkan cabai. Masak selama 1 menit, lalu tambahkan pasta kari, aduk dan masak selama 1 menit lagi. Larutkan kaldu blok dalam teko besar dengan 700ml air mendidih, lalu tuangkan ke dalam panci dan aduk hingga rata. Masukkan santan dan didihkan.

Tambahkan kecap ikan dan sedikit bumbu. Masukkan mi dan masak selama 3-4 menit lagi hingga melunak. Masukkan jus jeruk nipis, tambahkan udang dan masak hingga matang dan panas, sekitar 2-3 mins. Taburkan sebagian ketumbar.
Sajikan dalam mangkuk dengan sisa ketumbar dan irisan jeruk nipis di atasnya untuk diperas.
en_instructions:
Heat the oil in a sedang saucepan and add the chilli. Cook for 1 min, then add the curry paste, stir and cook for 1 min more. Dissolve the stock cube in a buah besar jug in 700ml boiling water, then pour into the pan and stir to combine. Tip in the coconut milk and bring to the boil.
Add the fish sauce and a little seasoning. Toss in the noodles and cook for a further 3-4 mins until softening. Squeeze in the lime juice, add the prawns and cook through until warm, about 2-3 mins. Scatter over some of the coriander.
Serve in bowls with the remaining coriander and lime wedges on top for squeezing over.

strMeal: Toad In The Hole (Sosis dalam Puding)
steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 200°C/fan 180°C/gas 6. Goreng sosis dalam wajan antilengket hingga kecokelatan.
Percikkan minyak sayur dalam loyang panggangan ukuran 30cm x 25cm x 6cm dan panaskan dalam oven selama 5 menit.
Masukkan tepung terigu ke dalam mangkuk, masukkan telur, lalu masukkan parutan lobak pedas. Secara bertahap masukkan susu semi-skim. Bumbui.
Masukkan sosis ke dalam loyang panggangan panas dan tuangkan adonan. Lengkapi dengan tomat ceri dan masak selama 30 menit hingga mengembang dan berwarna keemasan.
en_instructions:
Preheat the oven to 200°C/fan180°C/gas 6. fry sausages in a non-stick pan until browned.
disiram tipis-tipis vegetable oil in a 30cm x 25cm x 6cm deep roasting tray and heat in the oven for 5 minutes.
Put the plain flour in a bowl, crack in the sedang free-range eggs, then stir in the diparut horseradish. Gradually beat in the semi-skimmed milk. Season.
Put the sausages into the hot roasting tray and pour over the batter. Top with cherry tomatoes on the vine and cook for 30 minutes until puffed and golden.

ingredients.name: Lemon
ingredients.measure: The juice and zest of one

ingredients.name: Asparagus
ingredients.measure: 100g tips blanched briefly in boiling water

steps: Lelehkan mentega dalam panci berdasar tebal dan masak bawang bombay secara perlahan tanpa mengubah warnanya hingga lunak.
Tambahkan beras dan aduk agar seluruh butiran beras terlapisi mentega.
Tambahkan anggur dan masak perlahan sambil diaduk hingga terserap.
Secara bertahap tambahkan kaldu panas, aduk hingga setiap penambahan terserap. Terus aduk hingga beras menjadi empuk.

Bumbui dengan jus lemon dan parutan kulit lemon, serta lada sesuai selera. (Kemungkinan sudah ada cukup rasa asin dari salmon sehingga tidak perlu menambahkan garam). Aduk perlahan hingga panas merata.
Sajikan dengan taburan Parmesan dan sayuran musimannya.
Panggang salmon dan letakkan perlahan di atas risotto bersama udang dan asparagus.
en_instructions:
Melt the butter in a thick-based pan and gently cook the onion without colour until it is soft.
Add the rice and stir to coat all the grains in the butter
Add the wine and cook gently stirring until it is absorbed
Gradually add the hot stock, stirring until each addition is absorbed. Keep stirring until the rice is tender
Season with the lemon juice and zest, and pepper secukupnya. (there will probably be sufficient saltiness from the salmon to not need to add salt) Stir gently to heat through
Serve scattered with the Parmesan and seasonal vegetables.
Grill the salmon and gently place onto the risotto with the prawns and asparagus

steps: Iris tipis daging babi yang belum dimasak, sekitar ⅛". Sedikit membekukannya dapat membantu proses pengirisan (opsional).
Cincang halus bawang putih dan bawang merah (shallots). Campurkan dalam mangkuk bersama gula, kecap ikan, kecap asin kental, merica, dan minyak hingga gula larut.
Marinasi daging selama 1 jam, atau semalaman untuk hasil yang lebih baik.

Panggang babi pada suhu 375°F (190°C) selama 10-15 menit atau hingga matang sekitar 80%. Selesaikan memasak dengan memanggang (broiling) di dalam oven hingga berwarna cokelat keemasan yang bagus, balikkan potongan daging di pertengahan waktu.

Susun mangkuk Anda dengan sayuran, mi, dan hiasan. Banyak orang suka mencampur seluruh isi mangkuk dan menuangkan kecap ikan di atasnya, tetapi saya lebih suka membuat suapan individu dan menuangkan sausnya perlahan.
en_instructions:
Slice the uncooked pork tipis-tipis, about ⅛". It helps to slightly freeze it (optional).
Mince garlic and shallots. Mix in a bowl with sugar, fish sauce, thick soy sauce, pepper, and oil until sugar dissolves.
Marinate the meat for 1 hour, or overnight for better results.
Bake the pork at 375F for 10-15 minutes or until about 80% cooked. Finish cooking by broiling in the oven until a nice golden brown color develops, flipping the pieces midway.
Assemble your bowl with veggies, noodles, and garnish. Many like to mix the whole bowl up and pour the fish sauce on top, but I like to make individual bites and sauce it slowly.

steps: Didihkan air. Masukkan kerang ke dalam saringan dan siram di bawah air dingin. Buang kerang yang cangkangnya pecah. Periksa setiap kerang, ketuk masing-masing di sisi wastafel – kerang harus tertutup atau akan menutup perlahan saat diketuk – jika tetap terbuka, buang. Jika masih ada teritip atau serabut yang menempel pada cangkang, tarik dengan pisau makan dan bilas cangkang dengan baik. Simpan dalam saringan, tutup dengan kain lembap dingin, sampai siap dimasak. Kupas kulit udang pada bagian badan saja – biarkan kepala dan ekornya utuh. Sayat bagian punggung dan buang kotorannya. Dinginkan sampai siap dimasak.

Masukkan safron ke dalam cangkir kecil, tuangkan 50ml air panas mendidih dan sisihkan selama 10 menit. Jika menggunakan vermicelli, masukkan ke dalam mangkuk dan hancurkan menjadi potongan-potongan kecil (sekitar 1 cm panjangnya) dengan tangan Anda.

Panaskan minyak dalam wajan besar dengan pinggiran setidaknya 3 cm, atau wajan paella ukuran 40 cm. Tambahkan bawang bombay dan aduk selama 5 menit hingga lunak. Tambahkan bawang putih dan masak selama 1 menit lagi, lalu masukkan vermicelli dan masak selama 5 menit, aduk sesekali, hingga vermicelli berwarna cokelat keemasan. Masukkan paprika.

Jaga api tetap sedang, masukkan ikan monkfish, cumi-cumi, dan safron beserta air rendamannya, bumbui dengan baik. Ratakan bahan-bahan tersebut dalam satu lapisan, lalu tuangkan kaldu panas dan taburkan tomat di atasnya. Didihkan, lalu tutup seluruh wajan dengan penutup yang rapat (atau aluminium foil). Atur api ke sedang dan masak selama 6 menit.

Buka tutupnya dan aduk untuk menyatukan lapisan pasta yang kering di bagian atas. Tekan kerang ke dalam pasta sehingga bagian engselnya terkubur di dasar pinggan, dan kerang berdiri tegak. Susun udang di atasnya, tutup rapat dan masak selama 6 menit lagi atau hingga kerang terbuka, udang berwarna merah muda, dan pasta matang sempurna. Biarkan mendidih perlahan selama 2-3 menit lagi untuk menguapkan sebagian besar sisa cairan (sisakan sedikit di wajan agar pasta tidak lengket satu sama lain). Diamkan selama 2-3 menit, lalu peraskan jus lemon dan susun irisan lemon di atasnya. Taburkan peterseli sebelum disajikan.
en_instructions:
Boil the kettle. Empty the mussels into a colander and run under cold water. Throw away any with broken shells. Pick through the shells, tapping each one on the side of the sink – they should be closed or should slowly close when tapped – if they stay open, throw them away. If any of the shells still have barnacles or stringy beards attached, pull them off with a cutlery knife and rinse the shells well. Keep in the colander, covered with a cold, damp cloth, until you’re ready to cook. Peel the prawn shells on the body section only – leave the heads and tails intact. Score down the backs and pull out any gritty entrails. Chill until you’re ready to cook.
Put the saffron in a kecil cup, cover with 50ml kettle-hot water and set aside for 10 mins. If using vermicelli, put in a bowl and crush to little pieces (about 1cm long) with your hands.
Heat the oil in a buah besar frying pan with at least a 3cm lip, or a 40cm paella pan. Add the onion and stir around the pan for 5 mins until soft. Add the garlic and cook for 1 min more, then tip in the vermicelli and cook for 5 mins, stirring from time to time, until the vermicelli is toasted brown. Stir in the paprika.
Keeping the heat moderate, stir through the monkfish, squid and saffron with its water, seasoning well. Spread the ingredients out in an even layer, then pour over the hot stock and scatter the tomatoes on top. Bring to a simmer, then cover the whole dish with a tight-fitting lid (or foil). Turn the heat to sedang and cook for 6 mins.
Uncover and stir to incorporate the dry top layer of pasta. Push the mussels into the pasta so the hinges are buried in the bottom of the dish, and they stand straight up. Arrange the prawns on top, cover tightly and cook for another 6 mins or until the mussels are open, the prawns are pink and the pasta is cooked through. Leave to simmer for another 2-3 mins to cook off most of the remaining liquid (leave a little in the pan to prevent the pasta from sticking together). Allow to sit for 2-3 mins, then squeeze over the lemon juice and arrange the wedges on top. Scatter with parsley before serving.

steps: Panaskan minyak dalam wajan besar. Masukkan paha bebek dan biarkan kecokelatan di semua sisi selama sekitar 10 menit. Angkat ke piring dan sisihkan. Masukkan bawang bombay ke dalam wajan dan masak selama 5 menit hingga lunak. Masukkan bawang putih dan masak selama 1 menit lagi, lalu masukkan kayu manis dan tepung terigu, masak selama satu menit lagi. Kembalikan bebek ke wajan, tambahkan anggur, tomat, kaldu, bumbu dapur, gula, dan penyedap rasa. Didihkan, lalu kecilkan api, tutup dengan penutup dan masak selama 2 jam, aduk sesekali.

Carefully lift the duck legs out of the sauce and place on a plate – they will be very tender so try not to lose any of the meat. Pull off and discard the fat, then shred the meat with 2 forks and discard the bones. Add the meat back to the sauce with the milk and simmer, uncovered, for a further 10-15 mins while you cook the pasta.

Cook the pasta following pack instructions, then drain, reserving a cup of the pasta water, and add the pasta to the ragu. Stir to coat all the pasta in the sauce and cook for 1 min more, adding a splash of cooking liquid if it looks dry. Serve with diparut Parmesan, if you like.
en_instructions:
Heat the oil in a buah besar pan. Add the duck legs and brown on all sides for about 10 mins. Remove to a plate and set aside. Add the onions to the pan and cook for 5 mins until softened. Add the garlic and cook for a further 1 min, then stir in the cinnamon and flour and cook for a further min. Return the duck to the pan, add the wine, tomatoes, stock, herbs, sugar and seasoning. Bring to a simmer, then lower the heat, cover with a lid and cook for 2 hrs, stirring every now and then.
Carefully lift the duck legs out of the sauce and place on a plate – they will be very tender so try not to lose any of the meat. Pull off and discard the fat, then shred the meat with 2 forks and discard the bones. Add the meat back to the sauce with the milk and simmer, uncovered, for a further 10-15 mins while you cook the pasta.
Cook the pasta following pack instructions, then drain, reserving a cup of the pasta water, and add the pasta to the ragu. Stir to coat all the pasta in the sauce and cook for 1 min more, adding a splash of cooking liquid if it looks dry. Serve with diparut Parmesan, if you like.

steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 140°C/120°C (kipas). Letakkan panci tahan panas besar (dengan penutup yang rapat) di atas api besar. Tambahkan lemak angsa dan daging yang sudah dipotong dadu, masak selama beberapa menit hingga permukaannya matang, aduk cepat agar matang merata. Kecilkan api ke rendah, masukkan irisan bawang bombay, siung bawang putih utuh, wortel, dan biji adas (fennel), masak perlahan hingga sayuran lunak selama beberapa menit.

Pour over the red wine vinegar, scraping any meaty bits off the bottom of the pan. Add the stock, tomato purée, and half the rosemary and parsley. Bring to the boil and simmer for 10 mins, then season, cover with a lid and put into the oven for 2 hrs, removing the lid for the final hour of cooking. Stir occasionally and add the beans with 30 mins to go.

Remove the pan from the oven and heat the grill. Scatter the top with the remaining herbs and breadcrumbs, disiram tipis-tipis a little oil over the top, and return to the oven for 5-10 mins, until the breadcrumbs are golden. Serve with crusty bread and green veg.
en_instructions:
Heat oven to 140C/120C fan/gas 1. Put a buah besar ovenproof pan (with a tight-fitting lid) on a high heat. Add your fat and diced meat, cook for a few mins to seal the edges, giving it a quick stir to cook evenly. Reduce the heat to low, add the diiris onion, whole garlic siung, carrot and fennel seeds, and cook gently to soften the veg for a few mins.
Pour over the red wine vinegar, scraping any meaty bits off the bottom of the pan. Add the stock, tomato purée, and half the rosemary and parsley. Bring to the boil and simmer for 10 mins, then season, cover with a lid and put into the oven for 2 hrs, removing the lid for the final hour of cooking. Stir occasionally and add the beans with 30 mins to go.
Remove the pan from the oven and heat the grill. Scatter the top with the remaining herbs and breadcrumbs, disiram tipis-tipis a little oil over the top, and return to the oven for 5-10 mins, until the breadcrumbs are golden. Serve with crusty bread and green veg.

steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 200°C/fan 180°C/gas 6. Aduk kentang dengan 2 sdt minyak dan sedikit bumbu. Letakkan di atas loyang besar, lalu panggang selama 20 menit, aduk di pertengahan waktu, hingga renyah, keemasan, dan matang sempurna.

Meanwhile, put eggs in a kecil pan of water, bring to the boil, then simmer for 8-10 mins, depending on how you like them cooked. Plunge into a bowl of cold water to cool for a few mins. Peel away the shells, then cut into halves.

In a buah besar salad bowl, whisk together the remaining oil, red wine vinegar, capers and cincang tomatoes. Season, tip in the onion, spinach, tuna and potatoes, then gently toss together. Top with the eggs, then serve straight away.
en_instructions:
Heat oven to 200C/fan 180C/gas 6. Toss the potatoes with 2 sdt oil and some seasoning. Tip onto a buah besar baking tray, then roast for 20 mins, stirring halfway, until crisp, golden and cooked through.
Meanwhile, put eggs in a kecil pan of water, bring to the boil, then simmer for 8-10 mins, depending on how you like them cooked. Plunge into a bowl of cold water to cool for a few mins. Peel away the shells, then cut into halves.
In a buah besar salad bowl, whisk together the remaining oil, red wine vinegar, capers and cincang tomatoes. Season, tip in the onion, spinach, tuna and potatoes, then gently toss together. Top with the eggs, then serve straight away.

steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 200°C/400°F (180°C kipas).

Masukkan kentang ke dalam panci berisi air garam dingin. Didihkan dan rebus perlahan hingga benar-benar empuk. Tiriskan dengan baik lalu haluskan dengan mentega dan susu. Tambahkan lada dan cicipi bumbunya. Tambahkan garam dan lebih banyak lada jika perlu.

For the fish filling, melt the butter in a saucepan, add the leeks and stir over the heat. Cover with a lid and simmer gently for 10 minutes, or until soft. Measure the flour into a kecil bowl. Add the wine and whisk together until smooth.

Add the milk to the leeks, bring to the boil and then add the wine mixture. Stir briskly until thickened. Season and add the parsley and fish. Stir over the heat for two minutes, then spoon into an ovenproof casserole. Scatter over the eggs. Allow to cool until firm.
Spoon the mashed potatoes over the fish mixture and mark with a fork. Sprinkle with cheese.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until lightly golden-brown on top and bubbling around the edges.
en_instructions:
Preheat the oven to 200C/400F/Gas 6 (180C fan).
Put the potatoes into a saucepan of cold salted water. Bring up to the boil and simmer until completely tender. Drain well and then mash with the butter and milk. Add pepper and taste to check the seasoning. Add salt and more pepper if necessary.
For the fish filling, melt the butter in a saucepan, add the leeks and stir over the heat. Cover with a lid and simmer gently for 10 minutes, or until soft. Measure the flour into a kecil bowl. Add the wine and whisk together until smooth.
Add the milk to the leeks, bring to the boil and then add the wine mixture. Stir briskly until thickened. Season and add the parsley and fish. Stir over the heat for two minutes, then spoon into an ovenproof casserole. Scatter over the eggs. Allow to cool until firm.
Spoon the mashed potatoes over the fish mixture and mark with a fork. Sprinkle with cheese.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until lightly golden-brown on top and bubbling around the edges.

steps: Lelehkan lemak dalam wajan antilengket, biarkan hingga benar-benar panas, lalu masukkan bacon. Saat mulai kecokelatan, masukkan bawang bombay dan bawang putih. Selanjutnya, masukkan irisan kubis brussel atau kubis dan biarkan sedikit berubah warna. Semua ini akan memakan waktu 5-6 menit.

Next, add the potato. Work everything together in the pan and push it down so that the mixture covers the base of the pan – allow the mixture to catch slightly on the base of the pan before turning it over and doing the same again. It’s the bits of potato that catch in the pan that define the term ‘bubble and squeak’, so be brave and let the mixture colour. Cut into wedges and serve.
en_instructions:
Melt the fat in a non-stick pan, allow it to get nice and hot, then add the bacon. As it begins to brown, add the onion and garlic. Next, add the diiris sprouts or cabbage and let it colour slightly. All this will take 5-6 mins.
Next, add the potato. Work everything together in the pan and push it down so that the mixture covers the base of the pan – allow the mixture to catch slightly on the base of the pan before turning it over and doing the same again. It’s the bits of potato that catch in the pan that define the term ‘bubble and squeak’, so be brave and let the mixture colour. Cut into wedges and serve.

steps: Untuk nasi, panaskan minyak dalam panci besar bertutup, masukkan bawang bombay, lalu goreng perlahan selama 5 menit hingga lunak tetapi tidak berubah warna. Tambahkan rempah-rempah, bumbui dengan garam, lalu lanjutkan menggoreng hingga campuran mulai berwarna cokelat dan harum; sekitar 3 menit.

Add the rice and stir in well. Add 600ml water, stir, then bring to the boil. Reduce to a simmer, then cover for 10 mins. Take off the heat and leave to stand, covered, for 10-15 mins more. The rice will be perfectly cooked if you do not lift the lid before the end of the cooking.

Meanwhile, put the haddock and bay leaves in a frying pan, cover with the milk, then poach for 10 mins until the flesh flakes. Remove from the milk, peel away the skin, then flake the flesh into thumbsize pieces. Place the eggs in a pan, cover with water, bring to the boil, then reduce to a simmer. Leave for 4½-5 mins, plunge into cold water, then peel and cut the eggs into quarters. Gently mix the fish, eggs, parsley, coriander and rice together in the pan. Serve hot, sprinkled with a few extra herbs.
en_instructions:
For the rice, heat the oil in a buah besar, lidded pan, add the onion, then gently fry for 5 mins until softened but not coloured. Add the spices, season with salt, then continue to fry until the mix start to go brown and fragrant; about 3 mins.
Add the rice and stir in well. Add 600ml water, stir, then bring to the boil. Reduce to a simmer, then cover for 10 mins. Take off the heat and leave to stand, covered, for 10-15 mins more. The rice will be perfectly cooked if you do not lift the lid before the end of the cooking.
Meanwhile, put the haddock and bay leaves in a frying pan, cover with the milk, then poach for 10 mins until the flesh flakes. Remove from the milk, peel away the skin, then flake the flesh into thumbsize pieces. Place the eggs in a pan, cover with water, bring to the boil, then reduce to a simmer. Leave for 4½-5 mins, plunge into cold water, then peel and cut the eggs into quarters. Gently mix the fish, eggs, parsley, coriander and rice together in the pan. Serve hot, sprinkled with a few extra herbs.

steps: Putar kepala udang untuk melepaskannya, lalu kupas kaki dan kulitnya, tetapi biarkan bagian ekornya utuh. Buang kotoran pada setiap udang. Goreng kulit udang dalam 1 sdm minyak selama 5 menit, hingga berwarna merah muda tua dan keemasan di beberapa bagian. Tambahkan anggur, rebus hingga menyusut dua pertiganya, lalu tuangkan kaldu. Saring ke dalam teko, buang kulit udangnya.

Heat the rest of the oil in a deep frying pan or casserole. Add the fennel, onion and garlic, season, then cover and gently cook for 10 mins until softened. Meanwhile, peel the potato and cut into 2cm-ish chunks. Put into a pan of cold water, bring to the boil and cook for 5 mins until almost tender. Drain in a colander.
Peel a strip of zest from the orange. Put the zest, star anise, bay and ½ sdt harissa into the pan. Fry gently, uncovered, for 5-10 mins, until the vegetables are soft, sweet and golden.

Stir in the tomato purée, cook for 2 mins, then add the tomatoes and stock. Simmer for 10 mins until the sauce thickens slightly. Season secukupnya. The sauce can be made ahead, then reheated later in the day. Meantime, scrub the mussels or clams and pull away any stringy beards. Any that are open should be tapped sharply on the worktop – if they don’t close after a few seconds, discard them.

Reheat the sauce if necessary, then stir the potato, chunks of fish and prawns very gently into the stew. Bring back to the boil, then cover and gently simmer for 3 mins. Scatter the mussels or clams over the stew, then cover and cook for 2 mins more or until the shells have opened wide. Discard any that remain closed. The chunks of fish should flake easily and the prawns should be pink through. Scatter with the thyme leaves.

To make the quick rouille, stir the rest of the harissa through the mayonnaise. Serve the stew in bowls, topped with spoonfuls of rouille, which will melt into the sauce and enrich it. Have some good bread ready, as you’ll definitely want to mop up the juices.
en_instructions:
Twist the heads from the prawns, then peel away the legs and shells, but leave the tails intact. Devein each prawn. Fry the shells in 1 sdtp oil for 5 mins, until dark pink and golden in patches. Add the wine, boil down by two thirds, then pour in the stock. Strain into a jug, discarding the shells.
Heat the rest of the oil in a deep frying pan or casserole. Add the fennel, onion and garlic, season, then cover and gently cook for 10 mins until softened. Meanwhile, peel the potato and cut into 2cm-ish chunks. Put into a pan of cold water, bring to the boil and cook for 5 mins until almost tender. Drain in a colander.
Peel a strip of zest from the orange. Put the zest, star anise, bay and ½ sdt harissa into the pan. Fry gently, uncovered, for 5-10 mins, until the vegetables are soft, sweet and golden.
Stir in the tomato purée, cook for 2 mins, then add the tomatoes and stock. Simmer for 10 mins until the sauce thickens slightly. Season secukupnya. The sauce can be made ahead, then reheated later in the day. Meantime, scrub the mussels or clams and pull away any stringy beards. Any that are open should be tapped sharply on the worktop – if they don’t close after a few seconds, discard them.
Reheat the sauce if necessary, then stir the potato, chunks of fish and prawns very gently into the stew. Bring back to the boil, then cover and gently simmer for 3 mins. Scatter the mussels or clams over the stew, then cover and cook for 2 mins more or until the shells have opened wide. Discard any that remain closed. The chunks of fish should flake easily and the prawns should be pink through. Scatter with the thyme leaves.
To make the quick rouille, stir the rest of the harissa through the mayonnaise. Serve the stew in bowls, topped with spoonfuls of rouille, which will melt into the sauce and enrich it. Have some good bread ready, as you’ll definitely want to mop up the juices.

steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 200°C/180°C (kipas). Rebus kentang hingga empuk, tiriskan dan haluskan, lalu biarkan dingin. Panaskan minyak dalam wajan antilengket, masukkan daging giling dan bawang bombay, lalu goreng cepat hingga kecokelatan. Masukkan bawang putih, rempah-rempah, kaldu, banyak merica dan sedikit garam, lalu aduk rata. Angkat dari api, campurkan ke dalam kentang halus dan biarkan dingin.

Roll out half the pastry and line the base of a 20-23cm pie plate or flan tin. Fill with the pork mixture and brush the edges of the pastry with water. Roll out the remaining dough and cover the pie. Press the edges of the pastry to seal, trimming off the excess. Prick the top of the pastry case to allow steam to escape and glaze the top with the beaten egg.
Bake for 30 mins until the pastry is crisp and golden. Serve cut into wedges with a crisp green salad. Leftovers are good cold for lunch the next day, served with a selection of pickles.
en_instructions:
Heat oven to 200C/180C fan/gas 6. Boil the potato until tender, drain and mash, then leave to cool. Heat the oil in a non-stick pan, add the mince and onion and quickly fry until browned. Add the garlic, spices, stock, plenty of pepper and a little salt and mix well. Remove from the heat, stir into the potato and leave to cool.
Roll out half the pastry and line the base of a 20-23cm pie plate or flan tin. Fill with the pork mixture and brush the edges of the pastry with water. Roll out the remaining dough and cover the pie. Press the edges of the pastry to seal, trimming off the excess. Prick the top of the pastry case to allow steam to escape and glaze the top with the beaten egg.
Bake for 30 mins until the pastry is crisp and golden. Serve cut into wedges with a crisp green salad. Leftovers are good cold for lunch the next day, served with a selection of pickles.

steps: Untuk ikan asin, rendam ikan cod asin semalaman, ganti airnya beberapa kali.
Drain, then put the cod in a buah besar pan of fresh water and bring to the boil. Drain again, add fresh water and bring to the boil again.
Simmer for about five minutes, or until cooked through, then drain and flake the fish into buah besar pieces. Discard any skin or bones.
For the dumplings, mix the flour and suet with a sejumput of salt and 250ml/9fl oz water to make a dough.
Wrap the mixture in clingfilm and leave in the fridge to rest.
Open the can of ackee, drain and rinse, then set aside.
Heat a sdm of olive oil in a pan and fry the onion until softened but not brown.
Add the spices, seasoning, pepper sauce and diiris peppers and continue to fry until the peppers are tender.
Add the cincang tomatoes, then the salt cod and mix together. Lastly stir in the ackee very gently and leave to simmer until ready disiram tipis-tipis.
When you’re almost ready to eat, heat about 1cm/½in vegetable oil in a frying pan and heat until just smoking.
Shape the dumpling mix into plum-size balls and shallow-fry until golden-brown. (CAUTION: hot oil can be dangerous. Do not leave the pan unattended.)
Drain the dumplings on kitchen paper and serve with the saltfish and ackee.
en_instructions:
For the saltfish, soak the salt cod overnight, changing the water a couple of times.
Drain, then put the cod in a buah besar pan of fresh water and bring to the boil. Drain again, add fresh water and bring to the boil again.
Simmer for about five minutes, or until cooked through, then drain and flake the fish into buah besar pieces. Discard any skin or bones.
For the dumplings, mix the flour and suet with a sejumput of salt and 250ml/9fl oz water to make a dough.
Wrap the mixture in clingfilm and leave in the fridge to rest.
Open the can of ackee, drain and rinse, then set aside.
Heat a sdm of olive oil in a pan and fry the onion until softened but not brown.
Add the spices, seasoning, pepper sauce and diiris peppers and continue to fry until the peppers are tender.
Add the cincang tomatoes, then the salt cod and mix together. Lastly stir in the ackee very gently and leave to simmer until ready disiram tipis-tipis.
When you’re almost ready to eat, heat about 1cm/½in vegetable oil in a frying pan and heat until just smoking.
Shape the dumpling mix into plum-size balls and shallow-fry until golden-brown. (CAUTION: hot oil can be dangerous. Do not leave the pan unattended.)
Drain the dumplings on kitchen paper and serve with the saltfish and ackee.

steps: 1 Masukkan adas (fennel), terong, paprika, dan zucchini ke dalam loyang panggangan. Tambahkan percikan minyak zaitun, bumbui dengan garam dan merica, lalu aduk hingga sayuran terlapisi minyak. Panggang dalam oven selama 20 menit, balikkan beberapa kali hingga sayuran hampir matang dan berwarna keemasan.

2 Meanwhile, heat a paella pan or buah besar frying pan over a low– sedang heat and add a glug of olive oil. Sauté the onion for 8–10 minutes until softened. Increase the heat to sedang and stir in the rice, paprika and saffron. Cook for around 1 minute to start toasting the rice, then add the white wine. Reduce by about half before stirring in two-thirds of the stock. Reduce to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes without a lid, stirring a couple of times.

3 Stir in the peas, add some seasoning, then gently mix in the roasted veg. Pour over the remaining stock, arrange the lemon wedges on top and cover with a lid or some aluminium foil. Cook for a further 10 minutes.

4 To ensure you get the classic layer of toasted rice at the bottom of the pan, increase the heat to high until you hear a slight crackle. Remove from the heat and sit for 5 minutes before sprinkling over the parsley and serving.
en_instructions:
1 Put the fennel, aubergine, pepper and courgette in a roasting tray. Add a glug of olive oil, season with salt and pepper and toss around to coat the veggies in the oil. Roast in the oven for 20 minutes, turning a couple of times until the veg are pretty much cooked through and turning golden.

2 Meanwhile, heat a paella pan or buah besar frying pan over a low– sedang heat and add a glug of olive oil. Sauté the onion for 8–10 minutes until softened. Increase the heat to sedang and stir in the rice, paprika and saffron. Cook for around 1 minute to start toasting the rice, then add the white wine. Reduce by about half before stirring in two-thirds of the stock. Reduce to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes without a lid, stirring a couple of times.

3 Stir in the peas, add some seasoning, then gently mix in the roasted veg. Pour over the remaining stock, arrange the lemon wedges on top and cover with a lid or some aluminium foil. Cook for a further 10 minutes.

4 To ensure you get the classic layer of toasted rice at the bottom of the pan, increase the heat to high until you hear a slight crackle. Remove from the heat and sit for 5 minutes before sprinkling over the parsley and serving.

steps: Bilas ikan; lumuri dengan lemon atau jeruk nipis, bumbui dengan garam dan merica atau gunakan bumbu favorit Anda. Saya menggunakan bumbu creole. Sisihkan atau masukkan ke dalam oven agar tetap hangat sampai saus siap.

Dalam wajan besar, panaskan minyak dengan api sedang hingga panas, masukkan ikan, masak setiap sisi selama sekitar 5-7 menit sampai matang sempurna dan renyah di kedua sisi. Angkat ikan dan sisihkan. Tiriskan minyak dan sisakan sekitar 2-3 sendok makan minyak.
Masukkan daun salam, bawang putih, dan jahe, tumis selama sekitar satu menit memastikan bawang putih tidak gosong.

Kemudian masukkan bawang bombay, paprika, thyme, scotch bonnet, gula, allspice – lanjutkan mengaduk selama sekitar 2-3 menit. Tambahkan cuka, aduk dan sesuaikan garam serta merica sesuai selera. Biarkan mendidih perlahan selama sekitar 2 menit lagi.
Buang daun salam dan batang thyme, sajikan di atas ikan dengan pendamping bammy. Anda dapat membuat saus ini sekitar 2 hari sebelumnya.
en_instructions:
Rinse fish; rub with lemon or lime, seasoned with salt and pepper or use your favorite seasoning. I used creole seasoning. Set aside or place in the oven to keep it warm until sauce is ready.

In buah besar skillet heat oil over sedang heat, until hot, add the fish, cook each side- for about 5-7 minutes until cooked through and crispy on both sides. Remove fish and set aside. Drain oil and leave about 2-3 sdm of oil
Add, bay leave, garlic and ginger, stir-fry for about a minute making sure the garlic does not burn
Then add onion, bell peppers, thyme, scotch bonnet, sugar, all spice-continue stirring for about 2-3 minutes. Add vinegar, mix an adjust salt and pepper according to preference. Let it simmer for about 2 more minutes. 

Discard bay leave, thyme spring and serve over fish with a side of this bammy. You may make the sauce about 2 days in advance.

steps: Campurkan tepung maizena dan 1 sdm kecap asin, masukkan udang dan sisihkan selama 10 menit. Aduk cuka, sisa kecap asin, tomat puree, gula, dan 2 sdm air untuk membuat saus.

Saat Anda siap memasak, panaskan wajan besar atau wok hingga sangat panas, lalu tambahkan 1 sdm minyak. Goreng udang hingga berwarna keemasan di beberapa bagian dan sudah terbuka – lalu angkat dari wajan.

Panaskan sisa minyak dan masukkan kacang tanah, cabai, dan water chestnut. Tumis selama 2 menit atau hingga kacang mulai berubah warna, lalu masukkan jahe dan bawang putih, goreng selama 1 menit lagi. Masukkan kembali udang dan sausnya, masak selama 2 menit hingga sedikit mengental. Sajikan dengan nasi.
en_instructions:
Mix the cornflour and 1 sdtp soy sauce, toss in the prawns and set aside for 10 mins. Stir the vinegar, remaining soy sauce, tomato purée, sugar and 2 sdtp water together to make a sauce.

When you’re ready to cook, heat a buah besar frying pan or wok until very hot, then add 1 sdtp oil. Fry the prawns until they are golden in places and have opened out– then tip them out of the pan.

Heat the remaining oil and add the peanuts, chillies and water chestnuts. Stir-fry for 2 mins or until the peanuts start to colour, then add the ginger and garlic and fry for 1 more min. Tip in the prawns and sauce and simmer for 2 mins until thickened slightly. Serve with rice.

steps: Campurkan daging babi, bawang putih, jahe, kecap asin, minyak wijen, dan sayuran dalam mangkuk.
Pisahkan kulit wonton.
Letakkan satu sendok teh munjung isian di tengah kulit wonton.
Oleskan air pada 2 sisi pinggiran kulit, sekitar 1/4 inci dari tepi.
Lipat kulit untuk membentuk segitiga, rapatkan pinggirannya.
Jepit kedua ujung panjang di bagian luar secara bersamaan.
Panaskan minyak hingga 450°F (230°C) dan goreng 4 hingga 5 buah sekaligus hingga berwarna keemasan.
Tiriskan dan sajikan dengan saus.
en_instructions:
Combine pork, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, and vegetables in a bowl.
Separate wonton skins.
Place a heaping sdt of filling in the center of the wonton.
Brush water on 2 borders of the skin, covering 1/4 inch from the edge.
Fold skin over to form a triangle, sealing edges.
sejumput the two long outside points together.
Heat oil to 450 degrees and fry 4 to 5 at a time until golden.
Drain and serve with sauce.

steps: Persiapan
1. Pecahkan telur ke dalam mangkuk. Pisahkan putih telur dan kuning telurnya.
Babi Asam Manis
2. Iris daging babi tenderloin menjadi potongan memanjang (strip).
3. Siapkan bumbu marinasi menggunakan sedikit garam, satu sendok teh tepung pati (starch), dua sendok teh kecap asin encer, dan putih telur.
4. Marinasi potongan babi selama sekitar 20 menit.
5. Masukkan sisa tepung pati ke dalam mangkuk. Tambahkan sedikit air dan cuka untuk membuat saus pati yang kental.
Sweet and Sour Pork
Instruksi Memasak

1. Tuangkan minyak goreng ke dalam wok dan panaskan hingga 190°C (375°F). Masukkan potongan babi yang sudah dimarinasi dan goreng hingga berwarna kecokelatan. Angkat babi yang sudah matang dari wok dan letakkan di atas piring.
2. Sisakan sedikit minyak di dalam wok. Masukkan saus tomat dan gula pasir ke dalam wok, dan panaskan hingga minyak dan saus tercampur sempurna.
3. Tambahkan sedikit air ke dalam wok dan panaskan saus asam manis hingga benar-benar panas sebelum memasukkan potongan babi ke dalamnya.
4. Tuangkan saus pati. Tumis semua bahan hingga babi dan saus tercampur rata secara menyeluruh.
5. Sajikan di atas piring dan tambahkan sedikit ketumbar untuk hiasan.
en_instructions:
Preparation
1. Crack the egg into a bowl. Separate the egg white and yolk.

Sweet and Sour Pork
2. Slice the pork tenderloin into strips.

3. Prepare the marinade using a sejumput of salt, one sdt of starch, two sdts of light soy sauce, and an egg white.

4. Marinade the pork strips for about 20 minutes.

5. Put the remaining starch in a bowl. Add some water and vinegar to make a starchy sauce.

Sweet and Sour Pork
Cooking Instructions
1. Pour the cooking oil into a wok and heat to 190°C (375°F). Add the marinated pork strips and fry them until they turn brown. Remove the cooked pork from the wok and place on a plate.

2. Leave some oil in the wok. Put the tomato sauce and white sugar into the wok, and heat until the oil and sauce are fully combined.

3. Add some water to the wok and thoroughly heat the sweet and sour sauce before adding the pork strips to it.

4. Pour in the starchy sauce. Stir-fry all the ingredients until the pork and sauce are thoroughly mixed together.

5. Serve on a plate and add some coriander for decoration.

steps: LANGKAH 1 - RENDAM MI BERAS
Rendam mi beras semalaman hingga lunak
STEP 2 - REBUS MI BERAS
Rebus mi selama 10-15 menit lalu bilas dengan air dingin untuk menghentikan proses memasak pada mi.
STEP 3 - MARINASI UDANG
Dalam mangkuk, masukkan udang, telur, 1 jumput lada putih, 1 sendok teh minyak wijen, 1 sendok makan tepung maizena, and 1 sendok makan minyak
Aduk rata
STEP 4 - TUMIS
Dalam wok, tambahkan 2 sendok makan minyak, udang, dan tumis hingga berwarna cokelat keemasan
Sisihkan udang
Tambahkan 1 sendok makan minyak ke dalam wok lalu masukkan bawang putih cincang, jahe, dan semua sayuran.
Masukkan mi ke dalam wok
Selanjutnya tambahkan anggur masak sherry, saus tiram, gula, cuka, minyak wijen, 1 jumput lada putih, dan kecap asin
Masukkan kembali udang
Untuk mengentalkan saus, kocok 1 sendok makan tepung maizena dan 2 sendok makan air dalam mangkuk, lalu masukkan perlahan ke tumisan Anda hingga mencapai kekentalan yang diinginkan.
en_instructions:
STEP 1 - SOAK THE RICE NOODLES
Soak the rice noodles overnight untill they are soft
STEP 2 - BOIL THE RICE NOODLES
Boil the noodles for 10-15 minutes and then rinse with cold water to stop the cooking process of the noodles.
STEP 3 -MARINATING THE SHRIMP
In a bowl add the shrimp, egg, 1 sejumput of white pepper, 1 Teaspoon of sesame seed oil, 1 Tablespoon corn starch and 1 sdm of oil
Mix together well
STEP 4 - STIR FRY
In a wok add 2 Tablespoons of oil, shrimp and stir fry them until it is golden brown
Set the shrimp aside
Add 1 Tablespoon of oil to the work and then add dicincang halus garlic, ginger and all of the vegetables.
Add the noodles to the wok
Next add sherry cooking wine, oyster sauce, sugar, vinegar, sesame seed oil, 1 sejumput white pepper, and soy sauce
Add back in the shrimp
To thicken the sauce, whisk together 1 Tablespoon of corn starch and 2 Tablespoon of water in a bowl and slowly add to your stir-fry until it's the right thickness.

steps: LANGKAH 1 - MEMBUAT SUP
Dalam wok, tambahkan kaldu ayam dan tunggu hingga mendidih.
Selanjutnya masukkan garam, gula, minyak wijen, lada putih, saus cabai pedas, cuka, dan kecap asin, aduk selama beberapa detik.
Masukkan tahu, jamur, dan jamur kuping ke dalam wok.
Untuk mengentalkan saus, kocok 1 sendok makan tepung maizena dan 2 sendok makan air dalam mangkuk, lalu masukkan perlahan ke dalam sup Anda hingga mencapai kekentalan yang diinginkan.
Selanjutnya masukkan 1 butir telur yang sudah dikocok sedikit dengan pisau atau garpu ke dalam sup dan aduk selama 8 detik
Sajikan sup dalam mangkuk dan tambahkan babi panggang (BBQ pork) serta irisan daun bawang di atasnya.
en_instructions:
STEP 1 - MAKING THE SOUP
In a wok add chicken broth and wait for it to boil.
Next add salt, sugar, sesame seed oil, white pepper, hot pepper sauce, vinegar and soy sauce and stir for few seconds.
Add Tofu, mushrooms, black wood ear mushrooms to the wok.
To thicken the sauce, whisk together 1 Tablespoon of cornstarch and 2 Tablespoon of water in a bowl and slowly add to your soup until it's the right thickness.
Next add 1 egg slightly beaten with a knife or fork and add it to the soup and stir for 8 seconds
Serve the soup in a bowl and add the bbq pork and diiris green onions on top.

steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 180°C/fan 160°C/gas 4. Potong daun dari adas (fennel) dan sisihkan. Belah umbi adas menjadi dua, lalu potong setiap bagian menjadi 3 bagian memanjang. Masak dalam air garam mendidih selama 10 menit, lalu tiriskan dengan baik. Cincang daun adas secara kasar, lalu campurkan dengan peterseli dan parutan kulit lemon.

Ratakan adas yang sudah ditiriskan di atas pinggan tahan panas yang dangkal, lalu tambahkan tomat. Percikkan dengan minyak zaitun, lalu panggang selama 10 menit. Letakkan salmon di antara sayuran, percikkan dengan jus jeruk nipis, lalu panggang selama 15 menit lagi sampai ikan matang. Taburkan peterseli di atasnya dan sajikan.
en_instructions:
Heat oven to 180C/fan 160C/gas 4. Trim the fronds from the fennel and set aside. Cut the fennel bulbs in half, then cut each half into 3 wedges. Cook in boiling salted water for 10 mins, then drain well. Chop the fennel fronds roughly, then mix with the parsley and lemon zest.

Spread the drained fennel over a shallow ovenproof dish, then add the tomatoes. disiram tipis-tipis with olive oil, then bake for 10 mins. Nestle the salmon among the veg, sprinkle with lemon juice, then bake 15 mins more until the fish is just cooked. Scatter over the parsley and serve.

steps: Bumbui salmon, lalu lumuri dengan minyak. Campurkan semua bahan dressing menjadi satu. Belah dua, buang bijinya, kupas dan iris alpukat. Belah dua dan potong mentimun menjadi empat bagian secara memanjang, lalu potong-potong. Bagikan salad, alpukat, dan mentimun ke dalam empat piring, lalu percikkan dengan setengah bagian dressing.

Panaskan wajan antilengket. Masukkan salmon dan goreng selama 3-4 menit pada setiap sisi hingga renyah tetapi bagian dalamnya tetap lembap. Letakkan fillet salmon di atas setiap salad dan percikkan sisa dressing di atasnya. Sajikan hangat.
en_instructions:
Season the salmon, then rub with oil. Mix the dressing ingredients together. Halve, stone, peel and slice the avocados. Halve and quarter the cucumber lengthways, then cut into slices. Divide salad, avocado and cucumber between four plates, then disiram tipis-tipis with half the dressing.

Heat a non-stick pan. Add the salmon and fry for 3-4 mins on each side until crisp but still moist inside. Put a salmon fillet on top of each salad and disiram tipis-tipis over the remaining dressing. Serve warm.

steps: Panaskan 1 sdm minyak dalam wajan besar. Masukkan daun bawang dan masak selama 1 menit hingga lunak. Masukkan bayam dan masak selama 1-2 menit hingga layu. Angkat, biarkan dingin sedikit, lalu peras sisa cairannya dan cincang kasar.

Gunakan piring kecil sebagai panduan, potong 24 bulatan pastry filo berdiameter sekitar 12,5 cm (5 inci), potong 6 bulatan dari setiap lembar. Tumpuk bulatan filo, lalu tutup dengan cling film agar tidak kering.
Setelah campuran bayam dingin, peras sisa cairan sebanyak mungkin, lalu pindahkan ke mangkuk. Tambahkan tuna, telur, saus cabai pedas, serta garam dan merica sesuai selera. Aduk rata.

Panaskan oven ke suhu 200°C (400°F, gas mark 6). Ambil satu bulatan filo dan olesi tipis-tipis dengan sedikit sisa minyak. Letakkan bulatan kedua di atasnya dan olesi sedikit minyak, lalu letakkan bulatan ketiga di atasnya dan olesi minyak.

Letakkan satu sendok makan munjung isian di tengah bulatan, lalu lipat pastry untuk membentuk setengah bulan. Lipat pinggirannya, puntir untuk merapatkannya, dan letakkan di atas loyang anti lengket. Ulangi dengan sisa pastry dan isian hingga menghasilkan 8 brik.
Olesi tipis brik dengan sisa minyak. Panggang selama 12-15 menit atau hingga pastry garing dan cokelat keemasan.
Sementara itu, campurkan tomat dan mentimun dalam mangkuk dan taburi dengan jus lemon serta bumbu sesuai selera. Sajikan brik panas dengan salad ini dan chutney.
en_instructions:
Heat 2 sdt of the oil in a buah besar saucepan and cook the spring onions over a low heat for 3 minutes or until beginning to soften. Add the spinach, cover with a tight-fitting lid and cook for a further 2–3 minutes or until tender and wilted, stirring once or twice. Tip the mixture into a sieve or colander and leave to drain and cool.
Using a saucer as a guide, cut out 24 rounds about 12.5 cm (5 in) in diameter from the filo pastry, cutting 6 rounds from each sheet. Stack the filo rounds in a pile, then cover with cling film to prevent them from drying out.
When the spinach mixture is cool, squeeze out as much excess liquid as possible, then transfer to a bowl. Add the tuna, eggs, hot pepper sauce, and salt and pepper secukupnya. Mix well.
Preheat the oven to 200°C (400°F, gas mark 6). Take one filo round and very lightly brush with some of the remaining oil. Top with a second round and brush with a little oil, then place a third round on top and brush with oil.
Place a heaped sdtp of the filling in the middle of the round, then fold the pastry over to make a half-moon shape. Fold in the edges, twisting them to seal, and place on a non-stick baking sheet. Repeat with the remaining pastry and filling to make 8 briks in all.
Lightly brush the briks with the remaining oil. Bake for 12–15 minutes or until the pastry is crisp and golden brown.
Meanwhile, combine the tomatoes and cucumber in a bowl and sprinkle with the lemon juice and seasoning secukupnya. Serve the briks hot with this salad and the chutney.

steps: Cuci dan kupas kentang lalu potong menjadi potongan berukuran sama agar matang merata.
Dalam panci sup besar, rebus kentang dan daun salam dalam air garam selama 20 menit. Buang daun salamnya.

Jika Anda tidak menggunakan kantong kale keriting yang sudah dipotong, cuci bersih ikatan kale di bawah air mengalir yang dingin untuk membuang semua tanah – Anda tentu tidak ingin tekstur berpasir dalam hidangan Anda. Potong batang yang keras dan buang daun yang berwarna cokelat. Dengan pisau tajam, potong kale keriting menjadi irisan tipis.
Kupas dan cincang bawang merah.

Dalam wajan penggorengan, lelehkan 1 sdm mentega dan tumis bawang merah selama beberapa menit sebelum memasukkan kale keriting dan 2 sdm air. Bumbui dan masak selama sekitar 10 menit, atau hingga lunak.
Hangatkan susu di atas kompor atau di dalam microwave.

Tiriskan, kocok dan keringkan kentang dengan tisu dapur sebelum dihaluskan dengan penghalus kentang. Bekerjalah dengan cepat, tambahkan susu hangat dan sisa mentega. Bumbui sesuai selera dengan pala, garam, dan merica.
Campurkan kale yang sudah dimasak ke dalam campuran kentang halus.
Lengkapi dengan irisan sosis asap dan sajikan panas dengan mustard atau kuah (gravy) favorit Anda.
Sajikan dan nikmati!
en_instructions:
Wash and peel the potatoes and cut into similarly sized pieces for even cooking.

In a buah besar soup pot, boil the potatoes and the bay leaves in salted water for 20 minutes. Discard the bay leaves.

If you're not using a bag of ready-cut curly kale, wash the bunches thoroughly under cool running water to get rid of all soil—you wouldn't want that gritty texture in your finished dish. Trim any coarse stems and discard any brown leaves. With a sharp knife, cut the curly kale into thin strips.

Peel and chop the shallots.

In a frying pan or skillet, melt 1 sdtp. of butter and saute the shallots for a few minutes before adding the curly kale and 2 sdtp. of water. Season and cook for about 10 minutes, or until tender.

Warm the milk on the stove or in the microwave.

Drain, shake and dry the potatoes with kitchen towels before mashing with a potato masher or ricer. Working quickly, add the warm milk and the remaining butter. Season secukupnya with nutmeg, salt, and pepper. 

Mix the cooked curly kale through the cooked mashed potato mixture.

Top with slices of the smoked sausage and serve hot with your favorite mustard or gravy.

Serve and enjoy!

strMeal: Pork Chops Apel Skillet dengan Kentang Manis & Zucchini
steps: Sesuaikan rak oven ke posisi atas dan tengah lalu panaskan oven ke suhu 450 derajat F (230°C). Cuci dan keringkan semua bahan. Potong dadu kentang manis menjadi ukuran 1/2 inci. Aduk di atas loyang panggangan dengan percikan minyak, garam, dan merica. Panggang di rak atas selama 12 menit (kita akan memanggang zucchini setelah itu).

Sementara itu, belah dua dan buang inti apel; iris tipis membentuk bulan sabit. Kupas dan cincang halus bawang putih. Potong lemon menjadi empat bagian. Potong dan belah dua zucchini secara memanjang; potong melintang menjadi bentuk bulan sabit setebal 1/2 inci. Aduk di atas loyang panggangan kedua dengan percikan minyak serta sedikit garam dan merica. Sisihkan.

Keringkan daging babi dengan tisu dapur dan bumbui seluruh permukaannya dengan garam dan merica. Panaskan sedikit minyak dalam wajan besar di atas api sedang-tinggi. Masukkan babi dan masak hingga kecokelatan dan matang sempurna, 4-5 menit di setiap sisi. Matikan api; pindahkan ke piring.

Setelah kentang manis dipanggang selama 12 menit, pindahkan loyang panggangan berisi zucchini ke rak tengah dan lanjutkan memanggang hingga kedua sayuran berwarna kecokelatan dan lunak, selama 12-15 menit lagi.

Sementara itu, lelehkan 1 sdm mentega dalam wajan yang digunakan untuk babi di atas api sedang-tinggi. Masukkan apel dan bumbui dengan garam dan merica. Masak sambil mengerok bagian yang kecokelatan di dasar wajan, hingga apel sedikit lunak, 2-3 menit. Masukkan bawang putih; masak hingga harum, 30 detik. Tambahkan 1/2 cangkir air, konsentrat kaldu, dan 1 1/2 sdt gula. Masak sambil diaduk hingga saus mengental dan apel menjadi sangat empuk, 3-5 menit. Bumbui dengan garam dan merica.

Angkat wajan berisi apel dari api; masukkan 1 sdm mentega dan perasan air lemon. Bagikan daging babi, zucchini, dan kentang manis ke piring. Lengkapi daging babi dengan saus apel yang manis. Lengkapi zucchini dengan perasan air lemon.
en_instructions:
Serves 2


1. 

Adjust racks to top and middle positions and preheat oven to 450 degrees. Wash and dry all produce. Dice sweet potatoes into 1/2-inch pieces. Toss on a baking sheet with a disiram tipis-tipis of oil, salt, and pepper. Roast on top rack for 12 minutes (we'll roast the zucchini then). 


2. 

Meanwhile, halve and core apple; tipis-tipis slice into half-moons. Peel and siung chop garlic. Quarter lemon. Trim and halve zucchini lengthwise; cut crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick half-moons. Toss on a second baking sheet with a disiram tipis-tipis of oil and a sejumput of salt and pepper. Set aside. 


3. 

Pat pork dry with paper towels and season all over with salt and pepper. Heat a disiram tipis-tipis of oil in a buah besar pan over sedang-high heat. Add pork and cook until browned and cooked through, 4-5 minutes per side. Turn off heat; transfer to a plate. 


4. 

Once sweet potatoes have roasted 12 minutes, transfer baking sheet with zucchini to middle rack and continue roasting until both veggies are browned and softened, 12-15 minutes more. 


5. 

Meanwhile, melt 1 sdtP butter (2 sdtP for 4 servings) in pan used for pork over sedang-high heat. Add apple and season with salt and pepper. Cook, scraping up any browned bits from bottom of pan, until apple is slightly softened, 2-3 minutes. Add garlic; cook until fragrant, 30 seconds. Add 1/z cup water (3/4 cup for 4), stock concentrate, and 11/2 sdt sugar (3 sdt for 4). Cook, stirring, until sauce has thickened and apple is very tender, 3-5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. 


6. 

Remove pan with apple from heat; stir in 1 sdtP butter (2 sdtP for 4 servings) and a squeeze of lemon juice. Divide pork, zucchini, and sweet potatoes between plates. Top pork with glazed apple sauce. Top zucchini with a squeeze of lemon juice.

steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 450 derajat F (230°C). Cuci dan keringkan semua bahan. Potong ubi jalar menjadi potongan memanjang setebal ½ inci. Aduk di atas loyang panggangan dengan percikan minyak, garam, dan merica. Panggang hingga kecokelatan dan empuk, selama 20-25 menit.

Sementara itu, belah dua dan kupas bawang merah. Iris setipis mungkin hingga Anda mendapatkan ¼ cangkir; cincang halus sisa bawang merahnya. Kupas dan cincang halus bawang putih. Belah dua jeruk nipis; peras airnya ke dalam mangkuk kecil. Belah dua roti bun. Masukkan 1 sdm mentega ke dalam mangkuk kecil tahan microwave lainnya; panaskan hingga meleleh selama 30 detik. Oleskan pada sisi roti yang dipotong.
Ke dalam mangkuk berisi air jeruk nipis, tambahkan irisan bawang merah, ¼ sdt gula, dan sedikit garam. Aduk hingga rata; sisihkan untuk proses acar cepat (quick-pickle).

Panaskan sedikit minyak dalam wajan besar di atas api sedang-tinggi. Masukkan cincangan bawang merah dan bumbui dengan garam dan merica. Masak sambil diaduk hingga lunak, 4-5 menit. Masukkan bawang putih dan masak hingga harum, 30 detik lagi. Masukkan daging babi dan bumbui dengan garam dan merica. Masak sambil menghancurkan daging menjadi potongan-potongan kecil, hingga kecokelatan dan matang sempurna, 4-6 menit.

Saat daging babi dimasak, di mangkuk kecil ketiga, campurkan saus BBQ, cairan acar dari bawang merah, 3 sdm saus tomat (ketchup), ½ sdt gula, dan ¼ cangkir air. Setelah daging babi matang sempurna, masukkan campuran saus BBQ ke dalam wajan. Masak sambil diaduk hingga saus mengental, 2-3 menit. Cicipi dan bumbui dengan garam serta merica.

Sementara itu, panggang roti dalam oven atau toaster oven hingga keemasan, 3-5 menit. Bagikan roti yang sudah dipanggang ke piring dan isi dengan daging babi BBQ sebanyak yang Anda suka. Lengkapi dengan acar bawang merah dan saus sambal. Sajikan dengan kentang manis (ubi jalar) di sampingnya.
en_instructions:
1

Preheat oven to 450 degrees. Wash and dry all produce. Cut sweet potatoes into ½-inch-thick wedges. Toss on a baking sheet with a disiram tipis-tipis of oil, salt, and pepper. Roast until browned and tender, 20-25 minutes.

2

Meanwhile, halve and peel onion. Slice as tipis-tipis as possible until you have ¼ cup (½ cup for 4 servings); siung chop remaining onion. Peel and siung chop garlic. Halve lime; squeeze juice into a kecil bowl. Halve buns. Add 1 sdtP butter (2 sdtP for 4) to a separate kecil microwave-safe bowl; microwave until melted, 30 seconds. Brush onto cut sides of buns.

3

To bowl with lime juice, add diiris onion, ¼ sdt sugar (½ sdt for 4 servings), and a sejumput of salt. Stir to combine; set aside to quick-pickle.

4

Heat a disiram tipis-tipis of oil in a buah besar pan over sedang-high heat. Add cincang onion and season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring, until softened, 4-5 minutes. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, 30 seconds more. Add pork and season with salt and pepper. Cook, breaking up meat into pieces, until browned and cooked through, 4-6 minutes.

5

While pork cooks, in a third kecil bowl, combine BBQ sauce, pickling liquid from onion, 3 sdtP ketchup (6 sdtP for 4 servings), ½ sdt sugar (1 sdt for 4), and ¼ cup water (⅓ cup for 4). Once pork is cooked through, add BBQ sauce mixture to pan. Cook, stirring, until sauce is thickened, 2-3 minutes. Taste and season with salt and pepper.

6

Meanwhile, toast buns in oven or toaster oven until golden, 3-5 minutes. Divide toasted buns between plates and fill with as much BBQ pork as you’d like. Top with pickled onion and hot sauce. Serve with sweet potato wedges on the side.

steps: Preheat the oven to 350°. Remove the stems from one bunch of Tuscan kale and tear the leaves into 1" pieces (mustard greens, collards, spinach, and chard are great, too). Coarsely chop half a head of green cabbage. Combine the greens in a buah besar baking dish and add 4 siung of tipis-tipis diiris garlic. Adding some diiris onions and shiitake mushrooms at this point is optional, but highly recommended (I'll sauté the onions and mushrooms in a cast iron baking dish right on the stove before adding to the greens). Coat the greens with some olive oil and pour ½ cup chicken stock or broth over everything. Cover the dish with foil and bake until the greens are wilted, about 15 minutes. Remove foil and season with salt and pepper. Continue to bake until cabbage is tender, about 20-25 minutes more.

Meanwhile, heat a little olive oil in a buah besar skillet over sedang-high. Prick four sweet Italian sausages with a fork and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, 10 to 12 minutes. When the greens are done, slice the sausage and toss into the greens with a splash of your favorite vinegar (I like sherry or red wine).
en_instructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°. Remove the stems from one bunch of Tuscan kale and tear the leaves into 1" pieces (mustard greens, collards, spinach, and chard are great, too). Coarsely chop half a head of green cabbage. Combine the greens in a buah besar baking dish and add 4 siung of tipis-tipis diiris garlic. Adding some diiris onions and shiitake mushrooms at this point is optional, but highly recommended (I'll sauté the onions and mushrooms in a cast iron baking dish right on the stove before adding to the greens). Coat the greens with some olive oil and pour ½ cup chicken stock or broth over everything. Cover the dish with foil and bake until the greens are wilted, about 15 minutes. Remove foil and season with salt and pepper. Continue to bake until cabbage is tender, about 20-25 minutes more.

Meanwhile, heat a little olive oil in a buah besar skillet over sedang-high. Prick four sweet Italian sausages with a fork and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, 10 to 12 minutes. When the greens are done, slice the sausage and toss into the greens with a splash of your favorite vinegar (I like sherry or red wine).

steps: Panaskan oven ke suhu 350 derajat F (175 derajat C).

Panaskan panci besar di atas api sedang. Masukkan bacon dan sosis kielbasa; masak dan aduk hingga lemak bacon keluar dan sosis sedikit kecokelatan. Gunakan sendok berlubang untuk mengangkat daging dan pindahkan ke pinggan tahan panas besar atau oven Belanda (Dutch oven).

Lumuri potongan daging babi dengan sedikit tepung dan goreng dalam lemak bacon di atas api sedang-tinggi hingga berwarna cokelat keemasan. Gunakan sendok berlubang untuk memindahkan babi ke pinggan tadi. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang bombay, wortel, jamur segar, kubis, dan sauerkraut. Kecilkan api ke sedang; masak dan aduk hingga wortel lunak, sekitar 10 menit. Jangan biarkan sayuran menjadi cokelat.

Bersihkan dasar panci (deglaze) dengan menuangkan anggur merah dan aduk untuk melepaskan semua sisa makanan dan tepung yang menempel di dasar. Bumbui dengan daun salam, selasih, marjoram, paprika, garam, merica, biji jintan (caraway seeds), dan cabai cayenne; masak selama 1 minute.

Masukkan jamur kering, saus cabai pedas, kecap inggris, kaldu sapi, pasta tomat, dan tomat. Panaskan hingga mendidih. Tuangkan sayuran dan semua cairannya ke dalam pinggan tadi bersama daging. Tutup dengan penutup.
Panggang dalam oven yang sudah dipanaskan selama 2 1/2 hingga 3 jam, sampai daging sangat empuk.
en_instructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).

Heat a buah besar pot over sedang heat. Add the bacon and kielbasa; cook and stir until the bacon has rendered its fat and sausage is lightly browned. Use a slotted spoon to remove the meat and transfer to a buah besar casserole or Dutch oven.

Coat the cubes of pork lightly with flour and fry them in the bacon drippings over sedang-high heat until golden brown. Use a slotted spoon to transfer the pork to the casserole. Add the garlic, onion, carrots, fresh mushrooms, cabbage and sauerkraut. Reduce heat to sedang; cook and stir until the carrots are soft, about 10 minutes. Do not let the vegetables brown.

Deglaze the pan by pouring in the red wine and stirring to loosen all of the bits of food and flour that are stuck to the bottom. Season with the bay leaf, basil, marjoram, paprika, salt, pepper, caraway seeds and cayenne pepper; cook for 1 minute.

Mix in the dried mushrooms, hot pepper sauce, Worcestershire sauce, beef stock, tomato paste and tomatoes. Heat through just until boiling. Pour the vegetables and all of the liquid into the casserole dish with the meat. Cover with a lid.

Bake in the preheated oven for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, until meat is very tender.

steps: Rendam ikan haring dalam air dingin setidaknya selama 1 jam. Jika sangat asin, ulangi prosesnya dengan mengganti air setiap kali.
Tiriskan hingga benar-benar kering dan iris ikan haring menjadi potongan seukuran satu gigitan.
Masukkan ke dalam toples yang cukup besar untuk menampung potongan tersebut dan siram dengan minyak, allspice, butiran merica, dan daun salam. Tutup toplesnya.
Simpan di kulkas selama 2 hingga 3 hari sebelum dimakan. Ini akan tahan di kulkas hingga 2 minggu.
Sajikan dengan bawang bombay yang dicincang halus atau irisan bawang bombay, lemon, dan peterseli atau dill.
en_instructions:
Soak herring in cold water for at least 1 hour. If very salty, repeat, changing the water each time.

Drain thoroughly and slice herring into bite-size pieces.

Place in a jar buah besar enough to accommodate the pieces and cover with oil, allspice, peppercorns, and bay leaf. Close the jar.

Refrigerate for 2 to 3 days before eating. This will keep refrigerated up to 2 weeks.

Serve with siung cincang onion or onion slices, lemon, and parsley or dill.

steps: LANGKAH 1
